ivugaLa arthavEnembudannu tiLiyalu, avakke sambandhisida SAstragaLannu
tiLidukonDiruvudu atyavaSya. udAharaNegAgi, samAsa embudu
vyAkaraNa SAstrakke sambandhisiruva ondu pAribhAShika pada. idara artha
vEnembudannu sariyAgi tiLidukoLLabEkAgiddalli, modalige adakke
sambandhisida vyAkaraNa tatvagaLu entahavu embudannu tiLidukoLLuva
avaSyakateyide.

ittIcege naDeyuttiruva hosa hosa samSOdhanegaLalli heccinavU
ingliSh bhASheyallE varadiyAguttive. hAgAgi, avakke sambandhisidante
hosa hosa pAribhAShika padagaLU A bhASheyallE heccu heccu sxShTi
yAguttive. Adare, kannaDadantaha itara bhAShegaLalli I hosa viShaya
gaLannu vivarisabEkAdAgalella, avugaLallU takkudAda pAribhAShika
padagaLannu sxShTisikoLLuva avaSyakate kanDubaruttade. I pAribhAShika
padagaLa sxShTiyannu yAva rItiyalli naDesabahudu embudannu
pariSIlisuvudE I lEkhanada guri.

<a id="sub-4-5-8"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-4-5-8)

## eraDu rItiya vyAkaraNa jYAnagaLu

ondu bhASheyannu baLasuttiruvAga, nAvu eraDu rItiya vyAkaraNa
jYAnagaLannu upayOgisuttiruttEve. namma arivige eTakadantaha
vyAkaraNa jYAnavondu; idannu nAvu namma arivilladanteyE baLasu
tiruttEve; idaralli naDeyuva badalAvaNegaLU namage gottAgadante
naDeyuttiruttave. sAmAnyavAgi namma bhASheya bagegiruva I vyAkaraNa
jYAnavannu nAvu cikkandinalli bhASheyannu paDeyuvAga namagarivilla
danteyE paDediruttEve.

intaha arivige eTakada vyAkaraNa jYAna mAtravallade, namma
bhASheya kuritAgi arivige eTakuva vyAkaraNa jYAnavU nammallide. svalpa
maTTige nAvidannu kannaDada klAsinalli kalitiruttEve. anantaravU bhASheya
kuritAgi namagiruva kutUhalavannu taNisuvudakkAgi lEkhanagaLa
nnOdiyO athavA namma mAtannE gamanisiyO A mAtina Antarika
racaneyantahadu embudannu svalpamaTTige aritiruttEve. pAribhAShika


<a id="sub-4-5-9"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-4-5-9)

## pAribhAShika padagaLa sxShTi,

padagaLa sxShTi prAmukhyavAgi I eraDanE rItiya vyAkaraNa jYAnada
AdhArada mEle naDeyabEkAgide.

hAgAgi, intaha padagaLannu sxShTisuvavarige sAkaShTu arivige
eTakuva vyAkaraNa jYAnavilladiddalli avaru sxShTisuva padagaLu bhAShege
sariyAgi hondikoLLalAravu. idallade, intaha padagaLa mUlaka
SAstrakke sambandhisida viShayagaLannu arthamADikoLLalu vidyArthigaLige
kaShTavAgabahudu. avannu bhAShe (endare bhASheyannu baLasuva samAja)
svIkarisadiralU sAdhyavide. endare, hIge sxShTiyAda padagaLu
pAribhAShika padakOSagaLallaShTE uLiyalU sAdhyavide.

illi nAvu gamanisabEkAgiruva viShayavEnendare, pAribhAShika pada
gaLannu ondu bhASheya vidvAmsaru tamma arivige eTakuva vyAkaraNa
jYAnada AdhArada mEle racisi barahagaLalli baLasuttArAdarU, anantara
bhASheyalli naDeyuva adara baLake arivige eTakada vyAkaraNajYAnada
angavAgiyE naDeyabEkAguttade. I eraDaneya kriye samarpakavAgi
naDeyabEkiddalli antaha padagaLu bhASheya racanege honduvantiru
vudu avaSya.

vidvAmsaru sxShTisuva hosa hosa pAribhAShika padagaLu bhAShe
yalli sariyAgi hondikonDu, avannu kaliyuva vidyArthigaLige mattu
baLasuva itara vidvAmsarige tondareyAgadirabEkAdalli, antaha pada
gaLannu sxShTisuvavarella atyavaSyavAgiyU tiLidukoLLabEkAgiruva
viShayagaLu kelavive.

<a id="sub-4-5-10"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-4-5-10)

## padagaLa mUla

hosatAgi padagaLannu sxShTi mADuvAga adakke bEkAguva padAmSa
gaLannu endare dhAtugaLannu mattu pratyayagaLannu ellinda paDeyabEku
embudu ondu praSne. kannaDadalli pAribhAShika padagaLannu sxShTi mADu
vavarella ivannu samskxtadinda ettikoLLuvudu rUDhi. AdaShTu maTTige
ivaru ingliSh‌nalliruva padagaLannu hAgeyE uLisikoLLalu
prayatnisuttAre; avu kannaDa bhAShege svalpavU hondikoLLuvudilla
endu anisidalli mAtra, ivaru hosa padagaLannu sxShTisalu
hOguttAre.

kannaDaddE Ada dhAtu mattu pratyayagaLannu intaha pAribhAShika pada
gaLannu sxShTisuvalli baLasadiralu ivaru koDuva mukhya kAraNa
vEnendare, kannaDadalli I dhAtugaLige dinabaLakeya arthaviddu, niShkxShTa


vAda artha baruvante avannu SAstrIya barahagaLallU baLasidevAdare
gondalavunTAgalu sAdhyavide embudu.

ingliSh, phrenc modalAda bhAShegaLalli I samasyeyannu bagehari
suvudakkAgi grIk illavE lyATin bhAShegaLinda dhAtugaLannu mattu
pratyayagaLannu Amadu mADikoLLuva krama rUDhige bandittu. kannaDada
maTTige idE rItiyalli samskxtadinda dhAtugaLannu mattu pratyaya
gaLannu Amadu mADikoLLuvudu aShTE anukUla embudu ivara
vAda.

Adare, dinabaLakeya arthaviruva padagaLannu pAribhAShika padagaLAgi
baLasidalli gondalavunTAgaballudu emba vAda nijakkU sAdhAravE
embudannu pariSIlisuva avaSyakateyide. ingliSh‌na ittIcegina pravxtti
yannu gamanisidevAdare, dinabaLakeya padagaLE heccu heccAgi
pAribhAShika padagaLa sthAnadalli baLakege baruttiruvudu kanDubaruttide.

udAharaNegAgi, gaNakayantrakke (kampyUTar) sambandhisida pAri
bhAShika padagaLalli heccinavU dinabaLakeya padagaLE (mouse, tools,
paste, web, ityAdi). intaha padagaLannu aDakavAgi racisalu sAdhya
vAgade, dIrghavAda padagucchagaLannu baLasabEkAgi bandAga, avugaLalli
baruva padagaLa modalaneya akSharagaLannu mAtra baLasi aDakavAda
padagaLannu racisuva kramavU (URL ‘Uniform Resource Locator’,
FTP ‘File Transfer Protocol’, VBA ‘Visual Basic for
Applications’ ityAdi) ingliSh‌nalli beLedu bandide.

kannaDadallU idE vidhAnavannu yAke baLasabAradu? rAjakIya
pakShagaLannu hesarisuvalli mattu vyaktigaLannu hesarisuvalli (kuvempu,
tarAsu, anakx, ityAdi) intahadE vidhAna IgAgalE kannaDadalli
baLakeyallide. adannE pAribhAShika padagaLannu unTumADuvallU
baLasabahudu.

nAvu gamanisabEkAgiruva innondu viShayavEnendare, samskxta
dalli hosa pAribhAShika padagaLannu racisabEkAdAga, avaru bEre yAva
bhAShegU marehokkiralilla; samskxtadavE Ada pada mattu pratyaya
gaLannE baLasi tamage bEkAda hosa padagaLannu unTumADikonDiddaru.
lyATin‌nalliyU hIgeyE. I bhAShegaLalli I rIti tammavE Ada pada
mattu pratyayagaLannu baLasi pAribhAShika padagaLannu unTumADiruvudu
gondalakke eDekoDalillavAdare, kannaDadalli yAke gondalakkeDe
koDabEku?


pAribhAShika padagaLa sxShTi,

<a id="sub-4-5-11"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-4-5-11)

## eravalu mattu padasxShTi

ondu bhAShe eShTu sulabhavAgi bEre bhAShegaLinda padagaLannu eravalAgi
paDedukoLLaballudu embudu bahuSaH adannu baLasuva iDI samAjada
anisikeyannavalambiside. kannaDadalli intaha eravalu bahaLa sulabhavAgi
naDeyuttade, Adare, idakke viruddhavAgi, baLasabEkAgiruva padagaLannella
tamma bhAShege bhAShAntarisikoLLuva pravxtti tamiLinalli kANisuttade.

I eraDu vidhAnagaLalli yAvudu sari, yAvudu tappu emba
praSnege uttara koDuvudu kaShTa. ingliSh mattu jarman bhAShegaLa
naDuveyU intahadE vyatyAsaviruvudannu kANabahudu. ingliSh‌nalli
eravalu bahaLa sulabhavAgi naDeyaballudu, Adare jarman‌nalli
bhAShAntara vidhAnavannu baLasuvudE jAsti.

kannaDa bhASheyannu baLasuva samAja eravalannu bahaLa sulabhavAgi
angIkarisaballudAda kAraNa, pAribhAShika padagaLa sxShTiyalli samskxta
dhAtu mattu pratyayagaLa baLakege I samAjadalli heccina virOdha
vEnU tOribaruvudilla. A rIti racitavAda pAribhAShika padagaLannu
aragisikoLLuvudu mAtra vidyArthigaLige mattu itara Odugarige tumbA
kaShTavAguttide.

idallade, samskxtada badalu kannaDadavE Ada pada mattu pratyaya
gaLannu baLasi hosa padagaLannu unTumADidalli, antaha padagaLu
kannaDada jAyamAnakke heccu hondikeyAgaballuvu emba viShayadalli
samSayavilla. hosagannaDada padagaLu idakke anukUlavAgillavAdalli
haLegannaDada illavE kannaDadavE Ada upabhAShegaLa padagaLannu mattu
pratyayagaLannu idakkAgi ArisikoLLabahudallavE?

<a id="sub-4-5-12"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-4-5-12)

## bhAShAntara mattu arthAntara

ingliSh‌nalliruva pAribhAShika padavondakke badalAgi kannaDadalli ondu
hosadAda pAribhAShika padavannu sxShTisuvAga, adu ingliSh‌nallidda
padada oLaracane mattu adara artha ivannu pratibimbisabEkE athavA A
padakke SAstradalli yAva arthavideyO adannu pratibimbisabEkE emba
viShayadalli vidvAmsaroLage bhinnAbhiprAyavide.

udAharaNegAgi black box emba padakke badalAgi kannaDadallondu
pAribhAShika padavannu sxShTisabEkAdAga, A padada oLaracaneyannu mattu
adara arthavannu sUcisuvante kappu peTTige emba padavannu baLasa
bEkE, illavE A pada gurutisuva vastuvannu (cockpit recorder)


varNisuvante bErondu padavannu illavE padagucchavannu baLasabEkE
embudAgi sandEhavunTAgalu sAdhyavide.

vijYAna padakOSavannu kannaDadalli tayArisuvavaru modalaneya
vidhAnavannu anusarisiruvarAdare, adannE marAThiyalli tayArisuvavaru
eraDaneya vidhAnavannu anusariddAre. Adare, ivugaLalli yAvudannU
sampUrNa sariyendu hELalu baruvudilla. ondu padavannu baLasa
toDaguvAga, sAmAnyavAgi adu gurutisuva vastuvina guNadharma
gaLalli kaNNige hoDedu kANisuvantahadannu A pada varNisuvantira
bEkendu nAvu prayatnisuttEve. Adare, baLake munduvaridante A
vastuvina guNadharmagaLalli badalAvaNegaLunTAgalu sAdhyavide, mattu A
vastuvina kuritAgi namagiruva jYAnadallU badalAvaNegaLunTAgalu
sAdhyavide.

hAgAgi, baLasalu prArambhisida samayadalli ondu pAribhAShika
padada oLaracane mattu artha adu gurutisuva vastuvige anvayisu
vanteyE idditAdarU, anantarada kAladalli adu A rIti anvayisa
dante Agalu sAdhyavide. kannaDada ugibanDi pada idakke ondu uttama
udAharaNe. Igina kAladalli I pada gurutisuva sAdhana DIsel
illavE vidyucchaktiyinda calisuvudE jAsti.

idallade, bhAShegaLalli baruva padagaLa oLaracane mattu artha
ivakkU avu gurutisuva vastuvina guNadharmakkU naDuve asAngatya
viruvudE jAsti. kxShNa emba hesarina vyakti beLLagAgiruvudu, illavE
sundari emba hesarina huDugi kurUpiyAgiruvudu aShTondu
aparUpavEnalla. I hesarugaLannu baLasuvavarU avu vyaktigaLa illavE
vastugaLa guNadharmavannu sariyAgi tiLisuttirabahudendu nirIkShisu
vudU illa. padagaLu bhASheyalli bariya sankEtagaLAgi baLakeyAguvu
vallade, avu gurutisuva vastugaLa illavE viShayagaLa varNanegaLAgi
baLakeyAguvudu bahaLa kaDime. pAribhAShika padagaLU I rIti sankEta
gaLAgiddare sAku, varNanegaLAgirabEkendEnU illa.


<a id="part-5"></a>

[English →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-en#part-five--languages-of-the-world) | [ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#part-5)

## bhAga aydu
jagattina bhAShegaLu

prapancadalli oTTu eShTu bhAShegaLive emba praSnege txptikaravAda uttara
koDuvudu svalpa kaShTa. idakke halavu kAraNagaLive. samSOdhakara
gamanakke bAradiruva bhAShegaLu halaviveyembudu ondu mukhyavAda
kAraNa. udAharaNegAgi, dakShiNa amerikAda abhEdyavAda kADugaLalli
vAsisuva halavu janAngagaLannu mattu avarADuva bhAShegaLannu
samSOdhakarinnU sariyAgi abhyAsa mADilla. namma dESadallU guDDa
kADugaLalli vAsisuva halakelavu janAngagaLa bhAShegaLentahavembudannu
nAvinnU sariyAgi tiLidilla.

eraDaneyadAgi, eraDu samAjagaLalli baLakeyalliruva bhAShA
prabhEdagaLannu eraDu bhAShegaLendu parigaNisabEkE, illavE ondE
bhASheya eraDu prabhEdagaLendu parigaNisabEkE emba viShayadalli
abhiprAyabhEdagaLiralu sAdhya. I kAraNakkAgiyU bEre bEre
vidvAmsaru koDuva bhAShegaLa paTTi bEre bErAgalu sAdhyavide.

kelavu vidvAmsara matadante, prapancadalli oTTu sumAru aydu
sAvira bhAShegaLu baLakeyallive. I sankhye idakke eraDaraShTu, endare
sumAru hattu sAviradaShTendu hELuvavarU kelavariddAre, mattu
idannu mUru sAvirakke iLisuvavarU kelavariddAre. I bhAShegaLalli
heccinavannU inDO-yurOpiyan, TibeTO-barman, Aphri-
ESiyATik, AsTrik, inDO-pesiphik modalAda kelavu bhAShA
kuTumbagaLalli sErisi hELuva prayatnavU naDedide. mukhyavAgi intaha
hadinaydippattu bhAShAkuTumbagaLannu idakkAgi kalpisikoLLalAgide.

prapancadalli kANisuva I bhAShAvayvidhya ondu rItiyalli mAnava
samskxtiya vayvidhyavannu pratibimbisuttadeyendU hELabahudu.
pratiyondu samAjada bhASheyU A samAjadalliruva janara dinanityada
jIvanakke hondikoLLuvante sAvirAru varShagaLinda badalAguttA
bandide. Adare, I badalAvaNe bEre bEre samAjagaLalli bEre bEre


dikkinalli sAguvudE prapancadalli ivattu kANisuva bhAShA vayvidhyakke
mUla kAraNa.

manassinallEnideyembudannu itararige tiLisalu, mattu itarara
manassinallEnideyembudannu tiLiyalu nammalliruva atyanta mukhyavAda
sAdhanavendare I bhASheyE. ibbaru vyaktigaLADuva bhAShegaLa naDuve
eShTu vyatyAsaviruttadeyO, avarige obbarannobbaru artha mADi
koLLalu aShTE kaShTavU Aguttade. hAgAgi, bhASheyembudu manassugaLa
naDuvina konDiyU havdu, gODeyU havdu. I kAraNakkAgi, bhAShe
yondara svabhAvavEnembudannu tiLiyuvaShTE bhAShegaLa naDuvina vyatyAsa
gaLentahavembudannu tiLiyuvudU atyavaSya.

<a id="sec-5-1"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sec-5-1)

## ೫.೧ bhAratada bhAShegaLu

bhAratadalli mukhyavAgi inDO-Aryan, draviDiyan (drAviDa),
TibeTO-barman mattu AsTrO-ESiyATik embudAgi nAlku
bhAShAkuTumbagaLige sErida bhAShegaLu baLakeyallive:

1. (೧) hindi, bangAli, marAThi, gujarAti modalAdavugaLu
2. inDO-Aryan bhAShA kuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLu;
3. (೨) kannaDa, tamiLu, telugu, malayALa, tuLu modalAdavugaLu
4. drAviDa bhAShAkuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLu;
5. (೩) maNipuri (may‌tay), bODo, angAmi, Avo, luSAyi,
6. modalAdavugaLu TibeTO-barman bhAShA kuTumbakke sEridavugaLu;
7. mattu
8. (೪) santAli, munDAri, khaDiyA, sOrA modalAdavugaLu
9. AsTrO-ESiyATik bhAShA kuTumbakke sEridavugaLu.

ivallade, anDamAn mattu nikobAr dvIpagaLalli baLake
yalliruva bEre kelavu bhAShegaLu inDO-pesiphik emba bErondu
bhAShAkuTumbakke sEruttaveyendu kelavaru abhiprAyapaTTiddAre. madhya
pradESada nimAr jilleyalli baLakeyalliruva nahAli emba innondu
bhAShe I kuTumbagaLalli yAvudakkU sErade EkAkiyAgiruvudendu
kelavara abhiprAya.

bhAratadalli oTTu eShTu bhAShegaLiveyemba praSnege uttara hELuvu
dendare, prapancadalli oTTu eShTu bhAShegaLiveyemba praSnege uttara


hELuvaShTE kaShTa. heccu kaDime innUru bhAShegaLu bhAratadalliveyendu
hELabahudAdarU, I sankhye kADuguDDagaLalli vAsisuva janara bhAShe
gaLannu heccu heccu abhyAsa mADidantella heccAgalu (illavE
kaDimeyAgalu) sAdhyavide. idallade, bhAShe mattu upabhAShegaLa
naDuvina vyatyAsavEnembudannu nirdharisuvalli namma niluvEnu embu
dara mElU nAvu koDuva bhAShegaLa sankhye heccukaDimeyAgaballudu.

bhAratadalli baLakeyalliruva I innUru bhAShegaLalli ardhakkintalU
heccu bhAShegaLu himAlayada parvataSrENiyalli baLakeyalliruva
TibeTO-barman bhAShAkuTumbakke sErive. Adare, bhAratada janasankhye
yalli I bhAShegaLannADuvavaradu SEkaDA ondakkintalU kaDime!
himAlayada guDDakADugaLalli pratiyondu haLLigU ondondu viSiShTa
vAda bhASheyiruvudannu kANabahudu. I haLLigaLa naDuve anAdikAla
dindalU paraspara samparka bahaLa kaDimeyAgiddudE idakke kAraNa.

inDO-Aryan kuTumbakke sErida sumAru ೫೦ bhAShegaLu,
drAviDa kuTumbakke sErida ೨೬ bhAShegaLu, mattu AsTO-ESiyATik
kuTumbakke sErida ೨೦ bhAShegaLu bhAratadalli baLakeyallive. ivallade,
yAva kuTumbakkU sErada nahAliyantaha kelavu bhAShegaLU, inDO
-pesiphik kuTumbakke sEraballa anDamanIs mattu nikobarIs dvIpa
gaLa kelavu bhAShegaLU bhAratadallive.

<a id="sub-5-1-1"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-1-1)

## inDO-Aryan bhAShegaLu

ivugaLalli inDO-Aryan (Arya) kuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLu
yurOpina mukhya bhAShegaLAda ingliSh, phrenc, jarman
modalAda bhAShegaLige sambandhisiddu, A kuTumba inDO-yurO
piyan emba doDDadondu bhAShAkuTumbada SAkheyAgide. bhArata
dalli I kuTumbakke sErida nepAli, assAmIs, bangAli, oDiyA,
marAThi, gujarAti, panjAbi, kASmIri modalAda halavu bhAShegaLu
vxttAkAravAgi haraDiddu, avugaLa naDuve hindi mattu adara
upabhAShegaLAgiruva bAngru, braj, bundEli, avadhi, bhOj‌puri,
modalAdavugaLu nelesive.

nijakkU inDO-Aryan bhAShegaLu baLakeyalliruva I pradESa
bhASheya maTTige ondu avicchinna pradESavAgide. I pradESadalli uttara
dinda dakShiNakke illavE pUrvadinda paScimakke prayANa mADidalli,
haLLiyinda haLLige mAtina bhAShe svalpa svalpavE badalAguttA baruvudu


kanDubaruttade. Adare elli ondu bhAShe mugidu innondu bhAShe
prArambhisuttade embudannu janara mAtinalli kANisuva vyatyAsagaLa
AdhArada mEle tIrmAnisalu sAdhyavAgadu.

udAharaNegAgi, marAThi mattu gujarAti bhAShegaLannADuva pradESa
gaLa naDuve rAjakIyavAda gaDiyiruvudu nijavAdarU, A gaDipradESa
gaLalli janaru ADuva mAtina AdhArada mEle bhASheya gaDi elli
hAduhOguvudembudannu nirdharisalu sAdhyavAgadu. I kAraNakkAgi,
intaha gaDipradESadalliruva khAndESiyannu marAThiya upabhAShe
yendu hELabEkE, illavE gujarAtiya upabhASheyendu hELabEkE
embudaralli matabhEdavide. idE rItiyalli, marAThi mattu oDiyA
bhAShegaLa naDuve kANisuva halbi emba upabhAShe averaDaralli
yAvudakke sErabEku emba viShayadalli matabhEdavide.

drAviDa bhAShegaLa naDuviruva gaDi pradESa idakkinta tIra bhinna
vAdudu. kannaDa mattu telugu bhAShegaLa naDuve, illavE kannaDa mattu
tamiLu bhAShegaLa naDuve spaShTavAda gaDiyiddu illi vAsisuva janaralli,
avarADuva mAtannAdharisi, yAru kannaDigaru, yAru telugaru, mattu
yAru tamiLaru embudannu nirdharisuvalli yAva tondareyU illa.
ivugaLalli ondu bhASheyannADuvavaru innondu bhASheyannU
aritirabahudu, Adare avaralli yAra mAtxbhAShe yAvudu emba
viShaya spaShTavAgiyE iruttade.

inDO-Aryan bhAShegaLu parSiyan, balUci, paSo
modalAda irAniyan bhAShegaLondige hattirada sambandhavannu paDe
diddu, avannella oTTige inDO-irAniyan emba SAkheyalli sErisi
hELuvudu rUDhi. ivugaLalli inDO-Aryan bhAShegaLigella samskxta
bhASheyE mUlavendu kelavara abhiprAya.

innu kelavara matadante, I bhAShegaLigella mUlavAgidda bhAShe
bErondittu; baravaNigeya baLakegAgi, A mUlabhASheya AdhArada
mEle, samskxtavemba viSiShTavAda bhASheyondannu vidvAmsaru beLesira
bEku. inDO-Aryan mUlabhASheyannu baLasuttidda bEre bEre
samAjagaLalli naDeda badalAvaNegaLa phalavAgi, A mUlabhAShe pAli,
prAkxta, apabhramSa modalAda rUpagaLannu paDeyitu. anantara naDeda
badalAvaNegaLa phalavAgi, avE bhAShegaLu hindi, marAThi, gujarAti
modalAda indina bEre bEre inDO-Aryan bhAShegaLAgi
kANisikoLLuttive.


<a id="sub-5-1-2"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-1-2)

## drAviDa bhAShegaLu

kannaDa, tamiLu, telugu modalAda mukhyavAgi bhAratada dakShiNa vibhAga
dalli baLakeyalliruva bhAShegaLige I inDO-Aryan bhAShegaLiginta
tIra bhinnavAda mUlavide. hAgAgi, ivannu drAviDa emba bEreyE
ondu kuTumbadalli sErisuva avaSyakateyide. inDO-Aryan
bhAShegaLannADuva janaru bhAratakke valasegArarAgi baruva modalE I
drAviDa bhAShegaLannADuva janaru bhAratadalli nelesiddarendu vidvAmsara
Uhe.

bhAratada horagiruva bEre kelavu bhAShAkuTumbagaLondige drAviDa
bhAShegaLannu sambandhisuva prayatnagaLalli ondU iduvarege saphala
vAgilla. yurOpina yurAlik kuTumbada upakuTumbavAda phinnO
-ugrik‌nondige ivannu sambandhisabahudendu kelavara abhiprAya
vAdare, uttara AphrikAda kelavu bhAShegaLondige ivannu sambandhisa
bahudendu bEre kelavaru abhiprAyapaTTiddAre. mohenjadArOdalli
sikkida barahagaLa hindiruva bhAShe ondu drAviDa bhASheyAgira
bahudendu sAdhisalu bEre kelavaru prayatnisiddAre. Adare I ellA
prayatnagaLU UhApOhada sthitiyallE uLidive.

drAviDa bhAShegaLannu mukhyavAgi nAlku SAkhegaLalli vingaDisabahu
dendu vidvAmsaru abhiprAyapaTTiddAre:

1. (೧) kannaDa, tuLu, tamiLu, malayALa, koDagu, toda modalAda
2. bhAShegaLu dakShiNa drAviDa vibhAgadallU,
3. (೨) telugu, gOnDi, konDa, kUyi, mAnDa, pengo modalAda
4. bhAShegaLu dakShiNa-madhya vibhAgadallU,
5. (೩) kOlAmi, pArji, gadaba modalAdavugaLu madhya vibhAga
6. dallU, mattu
7. (೪) kuDukh, mAltO mattu brAhuyI bhAShegaLu uttara
8. vibhAgadallU sEruttave.

drAviDa bhAShegaLa I vibhajane avu mUlabhASheyinda yAva rIti
yalli kavaloDedirabEku embudannu avalambisideyAdarU, ivattu
avannADuva janaru nelesiruva pradESavannU I vibhajane pratibimbisu
ttade. dakShiNa drAviDa bhAShegaLannADuva janaru mukhyavAgi bhAratada
dakShiNa bhAgadalli (tamiLunADu, kEraLa, mattu karNATakagaLalli) nelesi
ddAre.


idE rItiyalli, uttara vibhAgada kuDukh bhASheyannADuva janaru
orissA, bihAr mattu madhyapradESada uttara bhAgagaLallU, mAltO
bhASheyannADuvavaru bihArada rAjamahAl parvata SrENiyallU
nelesiddAre. nEpALadalli nelisiruva dhanagar janAngadavarU kuDukh
bhASheyannADuttAre. uttara vibhAgada mUranE bhASheyAda brAhuyi
yannADuvavaru pAkistAnada uttara vibhAgadalli kveTTAdinda las‌belA
davarege kvAlAt, haripur mattu haydarAbAd jillegaLalli nelesi
ddAre.

dakShiNa-madhya drAviDa bhAShegaLAda telugu bhASheyannADuvavaru
Andhra pradESadalli, gOnDi bhASheyannADuvavaru madhyapradESadalli,
mattu konDa, kUyi mattu kUvi bhAShegaLannADuvavaru orissAdalli
nelesiddAre. idakke badalu, madhya drAviDa bhAShegaLAda kOlAmi mattu
nAyki bhAShegaLannADuvavaru Andhra pradESada uttara bhAgadalli, pArji
bhASheyannADuvavaru madhya pradESada bastAr jilleyalli, mattu gadaba
bhASheyannADuvavaru orissAdalli nelesiddAre.

I rIti, dakShiNa, dakShiNa-madhya, madhya, mattu uttara drAviDa
bhAShegaLu ondara uttarakke innondarante bhavgOLika haravannu
tOrisuttiveyAdarU, I bhAShegaLalli kelavu bEre pradESadalliruva
drAviDa bhAShegaLa vaySiShTyagaLannU tOrisuttiruvudu I vibhajaneya
ondu samasyeyAgide.

udAharaNegAgi, dakShiNadalli baLakeyalliruva tuLu bhAShe halavu
viShayagaLalli dakShiNada itara bhAShegaLi೦da bhinnavAgiddu, madhyadrAviDa
bhAShegaLannu hOluttade. dakShiNadallE iruva koraga emba innondu
bhAShe kelavu viShayagaLalli uttarada kuDukh mattu mAltO
bhAShegaLannu hOluttade. dakShiNa-madhya drAviDa bhASheyenisida telugu
halavu viShayagaLalli dakShiNa drAviDa bhAShegaLannu hOluttade, ityAdi.

<a id="sub-5-1-3"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-1-3)

## drAviDa bhAShegaLa naDuvina kelavu vyatyAsagaLu

I nAlku vibhAgagaLige sErida drAviDa bhAShegaLa naDuve halavu rItiya
vyatyAsagaLannu kANabahudu. ivattina drAviDa bhAShegaLu mUla drAviDa
bhASheyinda kavaloDedu bEre bEre bAShegaLAguttiruvante, avugaLalli
intaha vyatyAsagaLu mUDibandive.

mUla drAviDada vaySiShTyagaLalli kelavannu kelavu bhAShegaLu uLisi
konDive, mattu kelavu bhAShegaLu uLisikonDilla embudarinda I


vyatyAsagaLalli kelavu huTTikonDive, mattu innu kelavu vyatyAsagaLu
mUla drAviDadalli illadidda vaySiShTyagaLannu Adhunika bhAShegaLu
beLesikonDu bandiruvudarindAgi taledOrive.

udAharaNegAgi, mUladrAviDada sarvanAmagaLalli kELuganannu
sErisi hELuvavugaLu, mattu kELuganannu biTTu hELuvavugaLu embu
dAgi eraDu rItiya bahuvacana rUpagaLidduvu. tamiLu, malayALa,
tuLu modalAda bhAShegaLalli I vaySiShTya uLidide, Adare kannaDadalli
uLidilla. malayALadalliruva iccaL 'nAvu mAtra' mattu iಾm
'nAvu mattu nIvu' emba eraDu sarvanAmagaLige badalAgi kannaDadalli
nAvu emba ondE ondu sarvanAmavide embudannu illi gamanisa
bahudu. karAvaLiya kelavu kannaDa prabhEdagaLalli mAtra I vaySiShTya
ivattigU uLidukonDide (udA: havyakada engo mattu nAvu).
haLegannaDadallU I vyatyAsavittu.

dakShiNa-madhya drAviDa bhAShegaLallella naDeda ondu badalAvaNe
yendare, padada eraDanE akSharadallidda rakAra, DakAra, LakAra, mattu
lakAragaLu kelavu viSiShTavAda sannivESagaLalli modalaneya akSharakke
sthaLAntarisive. I badalAvaNeya pariNAmavAgi kannaDada eLeyavanu
emba pada kUvi bhASheyalli lAvenju endAguttade, mattu gOnDi
bhASheyalli leyyO endAguttade. idE rItiyalli kannaDada bareyu
embudu teluginalli rAyu endAguttade, aDagu embudu DAgu
endAguttade, uddu (urdu) embudu ruddu endAguttade, illa
embudu lEdu endAguttade, ityAdi.

<a id="sub-5-1-4"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-1-4)

## drAviDa mattu Arya bhAShegaLa naDuvina vyatyAsagaLu

drAviDa mattu Arya (inDO-Aryan) bhAShegaLa naDuveyU
vyAkaraNada maTTige halavu rItiya vyatyAsagaLu kanDubaruttive. ivu
gaLalli heccinavakkU I bhAShegaLige mUlavAgidda mUladrAviDa mattu
mUla inDO-yurOpiyan bhAShegaLu vAkyaracanegAgi bEre bEre
vyAkaraNa tantragaLannu baLasikonDiddudE kAraNavendu hELabahudu.

Arya bhAShegaLannADuva janaru bhAratakke valase banda mEle avara
bhAShegaLalli halavAru badalAvaNegaLu naDedive. ivugaLalli heccinavU A
kAladalli bhAratadalli baLakeyallidda drAviDa (mattu itara) bhAShegaLa
samparkadindAgi avannu heccu heccu hOluvante mADuva badalAvaNe
gaLE Agive. hIgiddarU I eraDu kuTumbagaLige sErida bhAShegaLa


naDuve ivattigU halavu mukhyavAda vyatyAsagaLu uLidiruvudannu kANa
bahudu.

Arya bhAShegaLalli nAmapada mattu kriyApada emba eraDu
mukhyavAda padavargagaLu mAtra ive; Adare, drAviDa bhAShegaLalli I
eraDu padavargagaLu mAtravallade, guNapada emba mUraneyadondu
padavargavU ide embudu intaha vyatyAsagaLalli mukhyavAdudu. I
vyatyAsada pariNAmavAgi, vAkyaracaneya mattu padaracaneya halavu
niyamagaLu I eraDu kuTumbagaLige sErida bhAShegaLalli bhinna bhinna
vAgive.

eraDaneyadAgi, nAmapadagaLannu bEre bEre lingagaLalli vingaDisu
vudakkAgi Arya bhAShegaLu baLasuva vidhAna drAviDa bhAShegaLu baLasuva
vidhAnakkinta tIra bhinnavAdudu. nAmapadagaLannu mukhyavAgi avugaLa
antyAkSharagaLa AdhArada mEle vibhajisuva krama Arya bhAShegaLadAdare,
arthada AdhArada mEle vibhajisuvudu drAviDa bhAShegaLu baLasuva
vidhAna. udAharaNegAgi, samskxtadalli 'henDati' emba ondE artha
viruva padagaLalli dArA: embudu pullinga, patni embudu strIlinga,
mattu kalitram embudu napumsakalinga. drAviDa bhAShegaLalli baLasuvu
diddare, I mUrU strIlinga padagaLE Agiruttave.

vibhaktigaLa baLakeyallU I eraDu kuTumbagaLige sErida bhAShegaLa
naDuve mukhyavAda vyatyAsagaLive. drAviDa bhAShegaLalli vibhakti pratyaya
gaLige arthadoDane nEravAda sambandhavide. Adare Arya bhAShegaLalli
intaha nEravAda sambandhavilla. I kAraNakkAgi, vibhaktigaLa baLakeyannu
varNisalu Arya bhAShegaLalli kArakagaLemba vyAkaraNa tatvavannu baLasa
bEkAguttade. avugaLa vAkyaracaneyalli kANisuva kartari-karmaNi
prayOgagaLa baLakeyU idE kAraNakkAgi udbhaviside. Adare, I
viShayadalli ivattina Arya bhAShegaLu svalpa badalAgive.

padaracaneya vidhAnavU I eraDu kuTumbagaLige sErida bhAShe
gaLalli bEre bErAgide. Arya bhAShegaLalli dhArALavAgi kANisuva
pUrva pratyayagaLa baLake drAviDa bhAShegaLallilla. heccina padagaLigU
kriyAdhAtugaLE mUla emba niyama Arya bhAShegaLallide, Adare
drAviDa bhAShegaLallilla.

samastapadagaLa vibhajaneyallU Arya mattu drAviDa bhAShegaLa
naDuve mukhyavAda vyatyAsagaLive. Arya bhAShegaLalli I vibhajaneyannu
samastapadada angagaLAgi banda padagaLalli pradhAna pada yAvudu emba


viShayada AdhArada mEle naDesabahudAdare, drAviDa bhAShegaLalli,
samastapadada modalaneya pada yAva vargakke sEruttade emba
viShayada AdhArada mEle naDesabEkAguttade.

drAviDa bhAShegaLalli kriyApadagaLu 'kAlabhEda'vannu sUcisuvu
vAdare, Arya bhAShegaLalli 'kAlavyavasthe'ya bhEdavannu sUcisuttave.
udAharaNegAgi, kannaDada hoDeyuttAne emba kriyArUpa mAta
nADuva samayakkinta anantara naDeyuva illavE mAtanADuva samaya
dallEnE naDeyuttiruva ghaTaneyannU, hoDeda emba kriyArUpa
mAtanADuva samayakkinta modalu naDeda ghaTaneyannU sUcisuttave.

idakke badalAgi, hindI bhASheyalli baruva AtA 'baruttAne' emba
kriyArUpa ondu apUrNa kriyeyannU, AyA 'banda' emba kriyA
rUpa ondu pUrNa kriyeyannU sUcisuttave. illi kAlabhEda mukhya
valla. I eraDu kriyArUpagaLannU vartamAnArtha koDuva hay emba
upakriyApadadondige (AtA hay, AyA hay), illavE bhUtArtha
vannu koDuva thA emba upakriyApadadondige (AtA thA, AyA
thA) baLasalu sAdhyavide. samskxtadallU I pUrNa mattu apUrNa
emba kAlavyavastheya bhEda bhUta mattu abhUta emba kAlabhEdakkinta
heccu mukhyavAdudu.

<a id="sub-5-1-5"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-1-5)

## TibeTO-barman bhAShegaLu

bhAratadalli kASmIradinda hiDidu tripurAdavaregU haraDiruva himA
layada parvataSrENiyalli TibeTO-barman emba bhAShA kuTumbakke
sErida laDAkhi, nevAri, leppA, bODO, gArO, AvO nAga, maNi
puri, luSAyi, tripuri, modalAda nUrakkU heccu bhAShegaLannADuva
janaru vAsisuttAre.

TibeTan mattu barmIs bhAShegaLondige mAtravalla, caynIs
bhASheyondigU I bhAShegaLige hattirada sambandhaviddu, ivella ondE
mUlabhASheyalli bEre bEre rItiya badalAvaNegaLAdudarindAgi bhinna
bhinna bhAShegaLAdavugaLendu vidvAmsaru kanDuhiDididdAre. TibeTO-
barman bhAShegaLigU, caynIs bhAShegU naDuve sambandhavideyembu
dannu sUcisuvudakkAgi adannu sinO-TibeTan emba innaShTu vistAra
vAda bhAShA kuTumbada upakuTumbavendu hindinavaru parigaNisiddaru.

Adare, ittIcege naDeda kelavu samSOdhanegaLu caynIs bhAShe
TibeTO-barman bhAShegaLalli kelavakke (endare bODo, gArO,


kirAntI, modalAduvakke) uLiduvakkinta heccu hattiravembudannu
tOrisikoTTive; mattu I samSOdhanegaLa AdhArada mEle, caynIs
mattu adakke sambandhisida bEre kelavu bhAShegaLannu oTTAgi TibeTO-
barman emba bhAShA kuTumbada ondu upakuTumbavembudAgi
parigaNisuva avaSyakateyunTAgide.

jagattina bhAShegaLallella inDO-yurOpiyan kuTumbakke sErida
bhAShegaLannu biTTare I TibeTO-barman emba bhAShAkuTumbakke
sErida bhAShegaLE atI heccu janara manemAtAgive. Adare, I bhAShA
kuTumbakkiruva janasankhyeya bala mukhyavAgi caynIs bhASheya jana
sankhyAbalada mEle avalambiside. sumAru nUru miliya janara
mAtAgiruva A bhASheyannu biTTare, uLida bhAShegaLalli ೨೨ miliya
janara mAtAgiruva barmIs mattu nAlku miliya janara mAtA
giruva TibeTan mukhyavAdavugaLu.

bhAratadalli baLakeyalliruva TibeTO-barman bhAShegaLalli ondu
miliyakkinta jAsti janara mAtAgiruva bhAShegaLu maNipuri mattu
bODO mAtra. ivallade, ೧೭೨ sAvira janara mane mAtAgiruva
AvO, mattu ೯೭ sAvira janara mane mAtAgiruva angAmi nAgA
bhAShegaLU I kuTumbakke sEruttave. ivakkinta kaDime janaru mAta
nADuva I kuTumbada bhAShegaLu bhAratadalli oTTu nUrakkintalU
jAsti ive.

I bhAShegaLannella paScima mattu pUrva bhAShegaLendu eraDu
mukhya vibhAgagaLalli vingaDisabahudu. ivugaLalli pUrva vibhAgavannu
uttara mattu dakShiNa vibhAgagaLendu vingaDisalu sAdhyaviddu, caynIs,
bODO modalAdavugaLu uttara vibhAgadallU, barmIs,
lOlO, maNipuri modalAdavugaLu dakShiNa vibhAgadallU sEruttave.

maNipuri bhASheyalli hadinaydanE SatamAnadindalU sAhitya racane
naDeyuttide. modalige I sAhitya granthagaLannu avaradE Ada maNipuri
lipiyalli bareyalAguttittu. Adare anantara, maNipuri janara mEle
vayShNava prabhAva beLedubanda samayadalli, I lipiyannu biTTukoTTu,
adara badalige bengAli lipiyannu baLasuva krama rUDhige bantu.

Adare, I lipiyalli maNipuri bhAShege avaSyavilladiruva halavAru
svara mattu vyanjana sanjYegaLiruva kAraNa, mattu A lipiyannu tamma
bhAShege aLavaDisikoLLuva samayadalli maNipuri vidvAmsaru I


avaSyavillada sanjYegaLannella hAgeyE uLisikonDiruva kAraNa, avara
bhASheya indina baraha tumbA toDaku toDakAgide.

<a id="sub-5-1-6"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-1-6)

## vyAkaraNada kelavu vaySiShTyagaLu

vyAkaraNada maTTige bhAratadalli baLakeyalliruva TibeTO-barman
bhAShegaLu halavAru vaySiShTyagaLannu tOrisuttave. I vyAkaraNa vaySiShTya
gaLu vAkyaracanegAgi I bhAShegaLu siddhapaDisikonDiruva viSiShTavAda
tantragaLAgiveyAda kAraNa, ivu I bhAShegaLannADuva janara samskxti
yannU pratibimbisuttaveyendu hELabahudu. hAgAgi, I bhAShegaLa
nnADuva janarannu sariyAgi arthamADikoLLabEkendiddare, avara bhAShe
gaLalli kANisuva I vyAkaraNa vaySiShTyagaLannU sariyAgi tiLidukoLLu
vudu avaSya.

Arya bhAShegaLa hAge, I kuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLallU nAma
pada mattu kriyApadagaLemba eraDu padavargagaLu mAtra kANisuttave.
Adare, guNapadagaLannu Arya bhAShegaLu nAmapadagaLondige sErisu
ttaveyAdare, I kuTumbada bhAShegaLu kriyApadagaLondige sErisu
ttave. udAharaNegAgi, samskxtadalli kxShNa: 'kappu' embudu ondu
nAmapada, Adare, TibeTO-barman kuTumbakke sErida maNipuri
bhASheyalli mU 'kappu' embudu ondu kriyApada. samskxtadalli
kxShNa: emba padakke linga-vacana-vibhakti pratyayagaLannu sErisuva hAge,
maNipuriyalli mU emba padakke kAlapratyayagaLannu mattu akhyAta
pratyayagaLannu sErisabahudu.

vibhakti pratyayagaLa baLakeyallU TibeTO-barman bhAShegaLalli
kelavu vaySiShTyagaLannu kANabahudu. udAharaNegAgi, maNipuri bhAShe
yalli baruva da emba saptamI vibhakti pratyayavannu kannaDada inda, ge
mattu alli emba mUru vibhaktigaLa arthadallU baLasalu baruttade.
ivugaLoLage vyatyAsavannu tOrisabEkiddalli, I pratyayadondige bEre
pratyaya illavE padagaLannu baLasabEkAguttade.

kannaDada vibhakti pratyayagaLalli annu embudannu baLasuvalli namage
svalpamaTTigina svAtantryavide endu hELabahudu. halavu sandarbhagaLalli
adannu baLasadiralU sAdhyavide: mane mArida mattu maneyannu
mArida embantaha vikalpavAda prayOgagaLannu kannaDadalli kANabahudu.
Adare bEre vibhakti pratyayagaLa baLakeyalli intaha svAtantryavilla.


TibeTO-barman bhAShegaLalli intaha svAtantryavannu heccina
vibhakti pratyayagaLa baLakeyallU kANabahudu. idallade, vibhakti pratyaya
vondara prayOgavAgideyE, athavA illavE emba viShayada
AdhArada mEle, bEre kelavu artha vyatyAsagaLannU I bhAShegaLalli
sUcisalu sAdhyavide. udAharaNegAgi, maNipuriyalli kannaDada annu
emba pratyayada arthaviruva bu emba pratyayavannu avaSyavilladalli
baLasidAga 'annu mAtra' emba artha baruttade (kAru emba
padadondige adannu baLasadiruvalli 'kArannu' emba artha baruvu
dAdare, baLasiruvalli 'kArannu mAtra' emba artha baruttade.)

vibhaktigaLa baLakeyalli innU halavAru vaySiShTyagaLannu I bhAShe
gaLalli kANabahudu. udAharaNegAgi, angAmI nAgA bhASheyalli ginu
mattu nunu emba eraDu saptamI vibhakti pratyayagaLive. ivugaLalli
modalaneyadannu bahaLa ettaradalliruva sthAnavannu sUcisuvalli baLasa
bEku, mattu eraDaneyadannu bahaLa tagginalliruva sthAnavannu sUcisu
valli baLasabEku. udAharaNegAgi, bassinalli kuLite endu hELa
bEkAdAga, A bassu parvatada tudiyalli sAguttiddare angAmi bhAShe
yalli ginu emba pratyayavannU, adu keLage kaNiveyalli sAguttiddare
nunu emba pratyayavannU baLasabEkAguttade.

TibeTO-barman kuTumbakke sErida bODO emba innondu
bhASheyalli kriyApadagaLu tiLisuva ghaTanegaLa sthAna vaySiShTyavannu sUci
suvudakkAgi avugaLondige halavAru pratyayagaLannu sErisi hELa
lAguttade. udAharaNegAgi, ddA 'tinnu' emba kriyApadadondige
klAy emba pratyayavannu sErisidalli 'keLagininda mElakke tinnu' emba
arthavU, dda pratyayavannu sErisidalli 'nekki tinnu' emba arthavU, pru
pratyayavannu sErisidalli 'madhyadinda kacci tinnu' emba arthavU, sler
pratyayavannu sErisidalli 'badiyinda tinnu' emba arthavU, ddob
pratyayavannu sErisidalli 'mElininda tinnu' emba arthavU baruttade.
I bhASheyalli intaha halavu bageya arthagaLannu koDaballa oTTu
innUra ayvattakkintalU jAsti pratyayagaLu baLakeyallive.

kannaDadalli barabahudu embudakke 'baruvudu sAdhya' emba
arthavU ide, 'baruvudakke oppigeyide' emba arthavU ide. idE
rItiyalli, barabEku embudakke 'baruvudu niScaya' emba arthavU
ide, 'baruvudu avaSya' emba arthavU ide. TibeTO-barman
bhAShegaLalli I eraDu rItiya arthagaLannu sUcisalu bEre bEre
pratyayagaLannu illavE padagaLannu prayOgisalAguttade. hAgAgi,


drAviDa mattu Arya bhAShegaLalli kANisuva I arthasandigdhate
TibeTO-barman bhAShegaLalli kANisuvudilla.

namma dESada ISAnya gaDipradESadalli nAvu halavAru rItiya
tondaregaLannu anubhavisuttiddEve. allina janaru ADuva bhAShegaLu
dilliya rAjakAraNigaLa bhAShegaLiginta tIrA bhinnavAgiruvuvAda kAraNa,
avara anisikegaLannu sariyAgi arthamADikoLLuvalli dilliya rAja
kAraNigaLu eDavuttiddAre. bahuSaH gaDipradESada tondaregaLige namma
rAjakAraNigaLu anubhavisuttiruva I bhAShAviShayaka samasyeyU
ondu kAraNavAgiraballudu. I viShayavannu svalpa ALavAgi pariSI
lisuva avaSyakateyide.

<a id="sub-5-1-7"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-1-7)

## AsTO-ESiyATik bhAShegaLu

bhAratadalli AsTO-ESiyATik emba hesarina I kuTumbakke sErida
bhAShegaLu mukhyavAgi bihAr, orissA, mattu madhyapradESagaLa guDDa
kADugaLalli nelesiruva janaralli baLakeyallive. drAviDa bhAShegaLannADuva
janara hAge, I bhAShegaLannADuva janarU Aryaru bhAratakke valase
baruva modalE illi nelesiddirabEku. I bhAShegaLalli ayvatteraDu lakSha
janara manemAtAgiruva santAli, mattu enTUvare lakSha janara mane
mAtAgiruva munDAri bhAShegaLu mukhyavAdavugaLu.

I bhAShegaLannu munDa mattu mOn-khmEr emba eraDu upa
kuTumbagaLAgi vingaDisalAgide. ivugaLalli munDa vibhAgakke sErida
munDAri, santAli, hO, khaDiyA, bhUmij, korku, sOrA
modalAda oTTu sumAru hadinenTu bhAShegaLU, mOn-khmEr
vibhAgakke sErida khAsi mattu nikobarIs emba eraDu bhAShegaLU
bhAratadalli baLakeyallive.

bhAratada horage baLakeyalliruva viyaTnamIs, khmEr (kambO
Diyan) modalAda bEre halavu bhAShegaLU I mOn-khmEr
gumpige sEruttave. Adare, munDa vibhAgakke sErida bhAShegaLu bhArata
dalli mAtra baLakeyallive. avannu mukhyavAgi dakShiNa munDa (sOra,
gOrum), korAput munDa (guthOb, remO), madhya munDa
(khaDiyA, juvAng), mattu uttara munDa (korku, santAli,
munDAri, korva, hO, ityAdi) embudAgi vingaDisalAguttade.

AsTrO-ESiyATik bhAShAkuTumbavannu caynA, viyeTnAm moda
lAda bhAratada horagiruva pradESagaLalli baLakeyalliruva miyan


mattu itara miyAv-yAv bhAShegaLondige, mattu thAy‌lEnDina
thAyi, lAvO, juvAng modalAda dAyik bhAShegaLondige
sErisi, AsTrik emba doDDadondu bhAShAkuTumbavannu kalpisikoLLa
bahudendu kelavaru vidvAmsaru abhiprAyapaTTiddAre.

<a id="sub-5-1-8"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-1-8)

## vyAkaraNada kelavu vaySiShTyagaLu

I kuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLu halavu viShayagaLalli bhAratada itara
bhAShegaLinda bhinnavAgive. udAharaNegAgi, munDa vibhAgakke sErida
munDAri bhASheyalli ellA padagaLU ondE padavargadalli baruttave.
endare, avugaLalli yAvudannu bEkiddarU nAmapadavAgi, kriyApada
vAgi illavE guNapadavAgi baLasalu sAdhyavide. udAharaNegAgi,
munDAri bhASheyalli 'mattu' emba arthavannu koDuva oDo emba
padavannu A arthadalli mAtravallade, vibhakti pratyayagaLondige 'hecci
navaru' emba arthadallU baLasabahudu, mattu AkhyAta pratyaya
gaLondige 'innomme mADu' emba arthadallU baLasabahudu.

munDAri bhASheyalli baruva bEre kelavu padagaLa arthavannu
pariSIlisidalli, adakkU itara bhAShegaLigU naDuve iruva I vyatyAsa
spaShTavAdItu. adara heccina padagaLallU 'vastu (illavE viShaya)'
mattu 'adakke sambandhisida ghaTane' emba I eraDu rItiya
parikalpanegaLU hudugiruttave; idannu keLage koTTiruva munDAri
padagaLalli kANabahudu.

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>ಮುಂಡಾರಿ ಪದ</th>
<th>ವಸ್ತು</th>
<th>ಸಂಬಂಧಿಸಿದ ಘಟನೆ</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>ಬುರು</td>
<td>‘ಪರ್ವತ’</td>
<td>‘ರಾಶಿ ಹಾಕು’</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ಗಪ</td>
<td>‘ನಾಳೆ’</td>
<td>‘ಮುಂದೂಡು’</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ಕುಮ್ಮು</td>
<td>‘ಕಳ್ಳ’</td>
<td>‘ಕದ್ದು ಕೋ’</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ಲುತುರ್</td>
<td>‘ಕಿವಿ’</td>
<td>‘ಕೇಳು’</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

munDAri bhASheya innondu vaySiShTyavEnendare, idara kriyApada
gaLu tiLisuva ghaTanegaLalli bEre bEre kAryagaLigAgi toDagikoLLuva
vyaktigaLannu sUcisalu A kriyApadagaLallEnE AkhyAta pratyayagaLannu
baLasuva vyavastheyide.

udAharaNegAgi, dal 'hoDe' emba kriyApadavannu baLasuvu
diddalli, adarondige 'hoDedaddu yAvAga' embudannu mAtravallade,


<a id="sub-5-1-9"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-1-9)

## viShyada bhAShegaLu

‘hoDedaddu yAru’, mattu ‘hoDedaddu yArige’ emba bEre eraDu
viShayagaLannU sUcisalu AkhyAta pratyayagaLannu baLasabahudu. I
bhAShAvaySiShTyavannu amerikAda sAliS bhAShegaLallU kANabahudu.

samskxta bhASheya hAge, munDAri bhASheyallU mUru vacana
gaLive mAtravalla, dvivacana mattu bahuvacanagaLeraDarallU kELuganannu
biTTu illavE sErisi hELuvante eraDeraDu sarvanAma rUpagaLive.
samskxtada kriyArUpagaLannu munDAri bhASheya kriyArUpagaLondige
hOlisi nODidevAdare, samskxtakkinta eShTO pAlu jAsti kriyA
rUpagaLu munDAriyalliruvudannu kANabahudu.

kannaDadalli alli mattu illi emba eraDu sthAnagaLannu nirdESisuva
sarvanAmagaLiveyAdare, munDAri bhASheyalli oTTu ombattu sthAna
gaLannu nirdESisuva sarvanAmagaLive. 'mAtanADuvavana hattira',
'dUra', mattu 'ivugaLa naDuve' emba mUru sthAnabhEdagaLannu
mAtravallade, ivugaLalli pratiyondU 'hattira', 'bahaLa hattira', mattu
'innaShTu hattira' embudAgi mUru heccina rUpagaLannu tOrisuttave.

AsTrO-ESiyATik kuTumbadallEnE mOn-khmEr emba upa
kuTumbakke sEruva, mattu mEghAlayadalli baLakeyalliruva, khAsi
bhAShe munDa bhAShegaLinda halavu viShayagaLalli bhinnavAgide. udA
haraNegAgi, khAsi bhASheyalli nAmapadagaLannu baLasuvAgalella u
'pullinga' illavE ka 'strIlinga' emba eraDu sarvanAmagaLalli yAvu
dAdarU ondannu avugaLondige baLasalEbEkemba niyamavide.

bahuvacanadallAdare, iveraDakkU badalAgi ki emba sarvanAmavannu
baLasabahudu. I sarvanAmagaLu lingabhEdavannu mAtravalla, aprANi
vAcaka padagaLondige bandAga avugaLa AkAra illavE gAtravannU
sUcisaballuvu (u sla 'cikka ele', ka sla 'doDDa ele')

<a id="sec-5-2"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sec-5-2)

## ೫.೨ EShyAda bhAShegaLu

bhAratadalli baLakeyalliruva bhAShAkuTumbagaLAda inDO-Aryan
(inDO-yurOpiyan), draviDiyan, TibeTO-barman mattu
AsTrO-ESiyATik embavugaLige sErida bhAShegaLu mAtravallade,
urAlik mattu alTEyik emba bEre eraDu kuTumbagaLige sErida
bhAShegaLU ESyAkhanDadalli baLakeyallive. ivallade, cukci-kAmcat


kAn, miyAv-yAv mattu dAyik emba innU mUru
kuTumbagaLige sErida bhAShegaLU I khanDadalli baLakeyallive.

inDO-yurOpiyan kuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLalli irE
niyan mattu ArmEniyan bhAShegaLu ESyAda nayxtya bhAgadalli
baLakeyallive. drAviDa bhAShegaLu bhAratadalli mAtravallade, pAkistAna
(brAhuyI), nEpAla (kuDukh), banglAdESa modalAda ESyAda bEre
kelavu dESagaLallU baLakeyallive.

TibeTO-barman kuTumbakke sErida caynIs bhAShe (nijakkU
idu mandArin, kenTonIs, vU, dakShiNa mattu uttara min, kEjA
modalAda halavu bhAShegaLa ondu upakuTumba) ESyA khanDada ondu
mukhyavAda bhAShe. idallade, I kuTumbakke sErida TibeTan mattu
barmIs emba inneraDu mukhyavAda bhAShegaLU ESyAdalli baLake
yallive.

AsTrO-ESiyATik kuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLalli bhAratada
horage ESyAdalli baLakeyalliruva bhAShegaLella mOn-khmer emba
upakuTumbakke sEruttave. viyaTnamIs mattu khmer (kambO
Diyan) bhAShegaLu ivugaLalli mukhyavAdavugaLu. intaha nUrayvattu
bhAShegaLu ESyAdalli baLakeyallive.

thAyi, lAvO modalAda oTTu aruvattu bhAShegaLannoLagonDa
dAyik kuTumba, mattu caynA, viyeTnAm, thaylEnD modalAda
dESagaLalli baLakeyalliruva miyAv-yAv kuTumba - iveraDannU
AsTrO-ESiyATik emba kuTumbadondige sErisi, AsTrik emba
doDDadondu bhAShAkuTumbavannu sAdhisabahudendu kelavaru abhi
prAyapaTTiddAre.

mukhyavAgi yurOp‌nalli baLakeyalliruva yurAlik bhAShegaLalli
samoyed emba upakuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLu ESyAda yurAl
parvataSrENiyalli baLakeyallive. alTayik kuTumbadalli Tarkik,
mongOliyan, mancu-tungus mattu koriyan emba nAlku
upakuTumbagaLu sEruttave. ayvattu miliya janara manemAtAda
TarkiS bhAShe ivugaLalli mukhyavAdudu. kelavara abhiprAyadante,
japAnIs mattu aynu bhAShegaLannU I alTayik kuTumbadalli
sErisabahudu.


೫.೩ yurOpina bhAShegaLu

yurOp khanDadalli mukhyavAgi inDO-yurOpiyan,
yurAlik mattu kavkESiyan emba mUru bhAShAkuTumbagaLige
sErida bhAShegaLu baLakeyallive. ivugaLalli inDO-yurOpiyan
kuTumbakke sErida ingliSh, phrenc, jarman, spAniS, raSyan
modalAda bhAShegaLannADuva janaru amerikA, AsTrEliyA, AphrikA
modalAda bEre bhUkhanDagaLigU valase hOgi allU vistAravAgi
haraDikonDiddAre. idarindAgi, ivattu jagattina oTTu janasankhyeya
lekkavannu hiDidalli, inDO-yurOpiyan bhAShAkuTumbakke sErida
bhAShegaLige modalaneya sthAna siguttade.

<a id="sub-5-2-1"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-2-1)

## inDO-yurOpiyan bhAShegaLu

I kuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLa sankhye nUrayvattakkinta jAstiyilla. I
bhAShegaLannADuva janara mUla yurOp khanDavAgideyAdarU
modalige hattirada ESyA khanDakke mattu ittIcege itara ellA khanDa
gaLigU I janaru valase hOgi, ivattu iDI bhUmiyannE Akramisi
konDiddAre. I kuTumbakke sErida ingliSh bhAShe ivattu jagattina
bhASheyeniside.

sumAru mUru sAvira varShagaLaShTu hinde ivattina Tarkiyalli
baLakeyalliddu, anantara naSisihOgidda hiTTayT emba bhAShe
inDO-yurOpiyan bhAShegaLige sambandhisiddendU, mattu I
bhASheyannu inDO-yurOpiyan bhAShegaLondige sErisi oTTAgi
inDO-hiTTayT emba innU doDDa bhAShAkuTumbavondannu
sAdhisalu sAdhya vendU kelavaru vAdisiddAre.

inDO-yurOpiyan bhAShegaLannu Sa-ka bhEdada AdhArada
mEle pUrva mattu paScima bhAShegaLendu vingaDisuva krama baLake
yallittu. Adare kakAravannu SakAravAgi mADiruva bhAShegaLa naDuve
kakAravannu uLisikonDiruva hiTTayT bhASheyideyembudannu kanDu
hiDidAga, I vibhajanege beleyilladAyitu. sadyakke inDO-
yurOpiyan bhAShegaLannu inDO-irEniyan, jarmEnik,
slAvik, bAlTik, kelTik, iTAlik, modalAda oTTu hanneraDu
upakuTumbagaLalli vingaDisuvudu rUDhi. I upakuTumbagaLalli grIk,


ArmEniyan mattu albEniyan‌gaLalli ondondu bhAShe (mattu avugaLa upabhAShegaLu) mAtra ide.

<a id="sub-5-2-2"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-2-2)

## itara bhAShegaLu

yurAlik kuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLalli madhyayurOpinalli baLake
yalliruva sumAru hadinaydu miliya janara manemAtAda
hangEriyan mukhyavAdudu. idallade, phin‌lEnDinalli sumAru aydu
miliya janara manemAtAgiruva phinniS bhASheyU I kuTumbakke
sEruttade. esTOniyAda estOniyan, skEnDinEviyAda lAp,
karEliyan, mOrDvin modalAda I kuTumbada itara mUvattu
bhAShegaLannADuva janara oTTu sankhye aydu miliyakkinta jAsti illa.
ESyAda uttara bhAgadallU I kuTumbakke sErida athavA sambandhisida
yukAghir, mAnsi modalAda bhAShegaLive.

I bhAShegaLa ondu vaySiShTyavEnendare ivugaLa padagaLallella
svaragaLa sAmarasya kANisuttade. idakkAgi padagaLalli baruva svaragaLannu
pUrva mattu paSca emba eraDu gumpugaLalli vingaDisuva avaSyakate
yide. ikAra mattu ekAragaLu pUrva svaragaLu, mattu ukAra, okAra
mattu akAragaLu paSca svaragaLu. yAva padadallU pUrva mattu paSca
svaragaLu oTTAgi baralAravu. hAgAgi, I bhAShegaLalli baruva pratyaya
gaLigella pUrvasvarayukta mattu paScasvarayuktagaLemba eraDeraDu rUpa
gaLiruttave.

udAharaNegAgi, hangEriyan bhASheyalli 'mEle' emba arthada
pratyayakke en mattu on emba eraDu rUpagaLive. ondu nAmapada
pUrvasvarayuktavAgiddare adarondige I pratyayada en emba rUpa
vannU (vidsen 'nIrina mEle'), mattu paScasvarayuktavAgiddare on
emba rUpavannU (lovon 'kudureya mEle') baLasabEkAguttade.

I bhAShegaLalli vibhakti pratyayagaLa sankhye sAmAnyavAgi bahaLa
doDDadu. udAharaNegAgi, per‌myAk emba bhASheyalli ೨೮ vibhakti
pratyayagaLive. I pratyayagaLu mukhyavAgi halavu bageya sthAnagaLannu
sUcisalu baLakeyAguttave. kannaDadalli inda mattu ge emba eraDu
asthAyi sthAnagaLannu sUcisuva pratyayagaLU, alli emba sthAyi
sthAnavannu sUcisuva vibhaktiyU ideyAdare, I bhAShegaLalli halavu
bageya sthAyi sthAnagaLannu sUcisuva pratyayagaLive.


kavkESiyan vibhAgakke sErida bhAShegaLalli heccinavU hindina
sOviyeT yUniyan‌nallidda kavkasas pradESadalli baLakeyallive.
ivugaLalli jArjiyan mukhyavAdudu. ab‌khAj, cecan, ghastAni,
dargvA, lej‌gi modalAda oTTu sumAru ೩೭ bhAShegaLannu I
vibhAgadalli sErisuvudu rUDhi. nijakkU I ellA bhAShegaLannU oTTAgi
ondu bhAShAkuTumbavendu parigaNisuvudakke sAkaShTu AdhAravinnU
doretilla. hAgAgi, kavkESiyan embudu ondu bhAShAkuTumba
vennuvudakkintalU ondu prAdESika vibhajaneyendu hELuvudE lEsu.

I bhAShegaLannu uttara mattu dakShiNa (kartEliyan) emba eraDu
gumpugaLAgi vingaDisabahudu. ivugaLalli uttarada bhAShegaLalli kANisi
koLLuva varNagaLa sankhye sAmAnyavAgi bahaLa doDDadu. udAharaNe
gAgi, yubikh bhASheyalli oTTu ೮೦ vyanjana varNagaLive. Adare I
bhASheyalliruva svaragaLa sankhye mAtra barE eraDu (ivu eraDu bageya
akAragaLu). I bhASheyalli u, o, i, e modalAda akArakkinta
bhinnavAda svaragaLilla.

kartEliyan bhAShegaLalli vibhaktigaLa sankhye adhika. udAharaNegAgi,
lAk bhASheyalli oTTu ೪೦ vibhaktigaLive. tabasAras emba innondu
bhASheyalli ೪೬ vibhaktigaLive. idara kelavu upabhAShegaLalli innU jAsti
vibhaktigaLive. ivugaLalli heccinavU bEre bEre sthAnagaLannu sUcisuvu
dakkAgi baLakeyAguttave. udAharaNegAgi, kannaDada saptamige badalAgi
sthAnada svarUpavannAdharisi, endare 'samataTTAda jAga', 'iLijArAda
jAga', 'mElmay', 'keLamay', 'khAli jAga', 'tumbida jAga', modalAda
bhEdagaLannAdharisi, I bhAShegaLalli halavAru pratyayagaLannu baLasa
lAguttade.

<a id="sub-5-2-3"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-2-3)

## ೫.AphrikAda bhAShegaLu

AphrikAdalli oTTu sumAru ondUvare sAviradinda hiDidu eraDu
sAviradaShTu bhAShegaLu baLakeyalliyendu vidvAmsaru abhiprAya
paTTiddAre. I bhAShegaLannella AphrO-ESiyATik, naylO-saharAn,
nayjar-korDOphEniyan, mattu khoysAn emba nAlku mukhya
kuTumbagaLalli vingaDisabahudendu ivaralli heccinavarU abhiprAya
paDuttAre. AphrikAdalli I nAlku kuTumbagaLigU sErade pratyEkavAgi
uLiyuva bhAShegaLU kelavive.


<a id="sub-5-2-4"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-2-4)

## Aphri-ESiyATik bhAShegaLu

I vibhAgakke sEruva sumAru innUra naluvattu bhAShegaLu AphrikAda
uttara bhAgadalli baLakeyallive. ivannu IjipTiyan, semiTik,
berber, cAdik, mattu kuSiTik emba aydu upavibhAgagaLalli
vingaDisabahudu. ivugaLalli kelavu bhAShegaLannu omOTik emba
innondu pratyEkavAda vibhAgadalli sErisabEkendu kelavaru abhiprAya
paTTiddAre. I upavibhAgagaLalli IjipTiyan embudakke sErida bhAShe
gaLella Iga aLidu hOgive. haLE IjipTiyan bhASheya barahagaLu
aydu sAvira varShagaLaShTu haLeyavu. adara ittIcegina prabhEdavendare
hadinAranE SatamAnada kOpTik bhAShe.

semiTik kuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLu arab dESagaLAda savdI
arEbiya, jOrDAn, irAk, isrEl, lebanAn, siriyAgaLallU,
sOmAliyA mattu ithiyOpiyAda heccina bhAgagaLallU, mattu
irAn hAgU Tarki dESagaLa kelavu bhAgagaLallU baLakeyallive.
akkADiyan embudu I vibhAgakke sErida ondu haLE bhAShe.

nUru miliya janara manemAtAgiruva arEbik, enTu miliya
janara mAtAgiruva amhArik, nAlku miliya janara mAtAgiruva
tigrIniyA modalAdavugaLu I semiTik vibhAgakke sErida Adhunika
bhAShegaLu. isrElina hIbrU bhASheyU idE vibhAgakke sEruttade.
kraystana kAladalli heccu kaDime pUrti naShTavAgi hOgidda I bhAShe
yannu punarujjIvanagoLisi Adhunika ADaLita bhASheyannAgi mADa
lAgide. ivattu idannu baLasuttiruvavara sankhye sumAru mUru
miliya.

semiTik vibhAgakke sErida I bhAShegaLa ondu vaySiShTyavEnendare,
ivugaLa padagaLalli heccinavugaLallU mUru vyanjanagaLa ondu dhAtu
viruttade. I dhAtuvinondige kelavE kelavu svaragaLa vinyAsagaLannu
baLasuvudara mUlaka, I bhAShegaLalli bEre bEre rItiya padagaLannu
mattu padarUpagaLannu sAdhisabahudu.

udAharaNegAgi, arEbik bhASheyalli k-t-b embudu 'bare'
embarthada ondu dhAtu. idannu bEre bEre svaravinyAsagaLondige
baLasi, kitAb 'pustaka', kAtib 'lEkhaka', kutubi 'pustaka vyApAri',
kataba 'baravaNigeyavanu', kitAb 'baraha', kuttAb 'prAthamika SAle'
modalAda padagaLannu sAdhisabahudu. idallade, ivakke bEre kelavu
vyanjanagaLannu sErisi, makkUb 'patra', miktAb 'Tayp‌rayTar',


makkab 'kacEri', makkaba 'granthAlaya', istriktAb 'hELi bareyisu',
iktitAb 'nOndAyisu' modalAda bEre halavu padagaLannu
racisabahudu.

I rIti, dhAtugaLa naDuvina arthavyatyAsavannu sUcisalu I bhAShe
yalli svaragaLa avaSyakateyillavAda kAraNa, idara barahadalli sAmAnya
vAgi vyanjanagaLannu mattu dIrghasvaragaLannu mAtra bareyuva krama
baLakege bandide. hrasva svaragaLannu, padagaLa koneyalli baruva vyanjana
gaLannu, mattu ottakSharagaLannu cikkamakkaLa paThyapustakagaLalli mattu kurAn
nalli mAtra sUcisalAguttade.

AsTrO-ESiyATik kuTumbada kuSiTik emba innondu upa
vibhAgakke sErida somAli, oromO, aphAr modalAda bhAShegaLu
suDAn, ithiyOpiyA, somAliyA modalAda dESagaLalli baLake
yallive. berber bhAShegaLu morokko mattu aljIriyAgaLalli
baLakeyallive. cAdik bhAShegaLalli havsA atyanta mukhyavAdudu. I
bhASheyannu manemAtAgi baLasuvavara sankhye sumAru hanneraDu
miliya, mattu eraDanE bhASheyAgi baLasuvavara sankhye sumAru
hadimUru miliya. I bhAShe mAtravallade, burA, mArba moda
lAda bEre sumAru nUra ippattu bhAShegaLU I upavibhAgadallive.
ithiyOpiyA mattu kenyAgaLalli baLakeyalliruva sumAru mUva
ttaydu bhAShegaLu omOTik vibhAgakke sEruttave.

AphrO-ESiyATik bhAShegaLa innondu vaySiShTyavEnendare, ivu
gaLa vAkyagaLalli sAmAnyavAgi kriyApada modalige baruttade. (kannaDa
dalli idu konege baruttade).

<a id="sub-5-2-5"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-2-5)

## naylO-saharAn bhAShegaLu

nayjIriyAda kanuri, cAd‌na nayjer, kenyAda luvO modalAda
sumAru tombattu bhAShegaLu I kuTumbakke sEruttave. I bhAShegaLu
AphrikAdalli AphrO-ESiyATik mattu nayjar-kOngO bhAShegaLa
naDuve vistarisive. suDAn mattu IjipTgaLalli baLakeyalliruva
nubiyan bhAShegaLU I kuTumbakke sEriddu, ivugaLa barahagaLu
enTanE SatamAnadindalU uLisikonDu baralAgide; idakkAgi ivu
grIk lipiyannu baLasuttive.

I bhAShegaLannu songhAy, pUrva suDAnik, mattu madhya
suDAnik embudAgi mUru gumpugaLalli vibhajisabahudu. I ellA


bhAShegaLU vEda kAlada samskxtada hAge udAtta, anudAtta moda
lAda nAdavayvidhyagaLannu tOrisuttave. kelavu bhAShegaLalli I vayvidhya
vannu vibhaktigaLa naDuvina vyatyAsavannu sUcisuvudakkAgiyU baLasalAgu
ide. pUrva mattu dakShiNa pradESada bhAShegaLalli kriyApadavu vAkyada
modala padavAgi baruttiddu, avu adakkanuguNavAda bEreyU halavu
vaySiShTyagaLannu tOrisuttave.

<a id="sub-5-2-6"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-2-6)

## nayjar-koDOphEniyan bhAShegaLu

AphrikAkhanDadalli baLakeyalliruva bhAShegaLalli heccinavU, endare
sumAru eraDu sAvira bhAShegaLalli ondUvare sAvira bhAShegaLU
nayjar-korDOphEniyan kuTumbakke sEruttave. I kuTumbavannu
nayjar-kOngO mattu korDOphEniyan embudAgi eraDu
mukhya vibhAgagaLalli vingaDisabahudu; idallade, nayjar-kOngO
vannu paScima aTlAnTik, mAndE, gur, kvA, benu-kOngO,
pUrva aDamAvA modalAda bEre bEre upavibhAgagaLAgi vingaDisa
bahudu.

nayjIriyAda yorubA, suDAnina tegAli, senegal‌na phulakunda,
pUrva AphrikAda halavu dESagaLalli baLakeyalliruva svahili,
jimbAbveya SOnA, rvAnDA mattu yugAnDagaLalli baLakeyalliruva
kinyAr‌vAndA, dakShiNa AphrikAda julu ityAdi bhAShegaLu I vibhAgakke
sEruttave.

AphrikA khanDada dakShiNa bhAgadalli haraDikonDiruva sumAru
aynUru banTu bhAShegaLU I nayjar-kOngO upavibhAgakke sEru
ttave. I bhAShegaLa ondu vaySiShTyavEnendare, ivugaLalli baruva nAma
padagaLallella eraDu angagaLiruttave; A padagaLa lingavannu sUcisuva
anga modalinadu, mattu adara arthavannu sUcisuva anga eraDa
neyadu. udAharaNegAgi, banTu emba I bhAShegaLa hesarinalli ba
embudu ondu lingasUcaka pratyaya; adu manuShyarannu sUcisuttade.

I bhAShegaLalli intaha hattu-hadinaydu lingasUcaka pratyaya
gaLiruttave. ivugaLalli kelavakke Ekavacana mattu bahuvacanagaLalli bEre
bEre rUpagaLiruttave. ivu vyakti, mara-giDa, jODi vastugaLu (kaNNu,
kivi, ityAdi), prANi, aprANi, cikka vastugaLu, ityAdi vargagaLalli
nAmapadagaLannu hancuttave. nAmapadagaLa angagaLAgi baruva I


<a id="sub-5-2-7"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-2-7)

## amerikAda bhAShegaLu

lingabhEdavannu vAkyadalli baruva bEre halavAru padagaLU sUcisu
ttave.

<a id="sub-5-2-8"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-2-8)

## boysAn bhAShegaLu

AphrikAda nayxtya bhAgada kalahAri marubhUmi pradESadalli baLake
yalliruva khU, nAma hoTTenTOT, sandAvE, hatsa modalAda
sumAru mUvattu bhAShegaLu I kuTumbakke sEruttave. ivugaLa
nnADuva janaralli heccinavarU kuLLaru. hindina kAladalli ivaru
AphrikAda dakShiNa bhAgadallella haraDiddarendu tOruttade. Adare uttara
dinda banTu bhASheyannADuva janarU, dakShiNadinda Dac bhASheya
nnADuva vasAhatudArarU oTTige sEri ivarannu marubhUmige taLLi
ddAre.

OShTya, tAlavya, ghOSha, aghOSha modalAda halavu bageya
'klik'varNagaLiruvudu I bhAShegaLa ondu prAmukhyavAda vaySiShTya.

<a id="sec-5-5"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sec-5-5)

## ೫.೫ amerikAda bhAShegaLu

amerikA khanDagaLannu yurOpina janaru kanDuhiDiyuvudakkinta
modalu alli nUrAru bhAShegaLannADuva janaru vAsisuttiddaru. uttara
mattu dakShiNa amerikAgaLalli oTTige intaha sumAru ondu sAvira
bhAShegaLu baLakeyalli ddirabEku.

ivugaLalli halavu avugaLannADuva janAngagaLondige nASa
gonDive. innu halavu nASada hAdiyallive. ivugaLalli kelavannu sadyakke
baLasuttiruvavaru ibbarO mUvarO mudukaru mAtra. I rIti
bahaLamaTTige aLidu hOgi, Iga uLidiruva, AdarU SIghravAgi
aLiyuttiruva, sumAru ೬೫೦ bhAShegaLu I bEre bEre janAngagaLalli
ivattu baLakeyallive.

amerikAda eraDu khanDagaLalli haraDiruva I bhAShegaLannella
eskimO-aleyut, nA-Dene, mattu amerinD emba mUru mukhya
kuTumbagaLalli sEruvante vibhajisabahudendu vidvAmsaru kelavaru
abhiprAyapaTTiddAre. I abhiprAyadante, eskimO-aleyut‌ge sErida
hattu bhAShegaLu, mattu nA-Denege sErida mUvattamUru bhAShegaLannu
biTTare uLiduvellavU amerinD emba bhAShA kuTumbakke sEruttave.


<a id="sub-5-5-1"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-5-1)

## eskimO bhAShegaLu

eskimO-aleyut bhAShegaLu alAskA, grIn‌lEnD, saybIriyA
modalAda uttaradhruvakke samIpada pradESagaLalli baLakeyallive.
aleyut, yUpik, inuyit, alAskan modalAda bhAShegaLu I
kuTumbakke sEruttave.

eskimO bhAShegaLa ondu vaySiShTyavEnendare, ondu doDDa vAkya
dalli baraballa viShayagaLannella barE ondu padadalli aDakavAgi hELuva
krama I bhAShegaLallide. Adare, idakkAgi A padadondige halavAru
pratyayagaLannu sErisi hELabEkAguttade. ondu ghaTaneyannu sUcisuva
padadondige yAru, yArannu, yAvAga, yAke, elli, yArigAgi A
ghaTaneyalli toDagisidaru embudannu tiLisuvudakkAgi I rIti halavu
bageya pratyayagaLannu kriyApadagaLige sErisabahudu. I kAraNakkAgi,
bhAratada munDAri bhASheya hAge, mattu amerikAda sAliSAn bhAShe
gaLa hAge, I bhAShegaLannU 'pOlisintheTik' bhAShegaLendu parigaNisa
lAguttade.

<a id="sub-5-5-2"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-5-2)

## nA-Dene bhAShegaLu

nA-Dene bhAShegaLendare mukhyavAgi athabAskan emba upakuTumbakke
sErida navahO, apAcE, sArsI modalAda sumAru mUvattu
bhAShegaLu, mattu ivakkinta bhinnavAda eyAk, haydA mattu tlingit
emba bhAShegaLu. ivugaLalli eyAk bhASheyannADuvavaralli ivattu
(೧೯೯೬ralli) obba vyakti mAtra jIvantavAgiddAne.

uttara amerikAdalli yuTO-aj‌Tekan bhAShegaLannu biTTare, ati
heccu bhAShegaLiruva mattu ati heccu janaru baLasuva bhAShA(upa)
kuTumbavendare, I athabAskan embudAgide.

<a id="sub-5-5-3"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-5-3)

## amerikan bhAShegaLu

amerinD embudu amerikan inDiyan embudara sankShipta rUpa.
amerikA khanDagaLannu modala bArige talupida pAScAtyara tappu
kalpaneyindAgi, inDiyan emba hesaru ivarige bandideyAdarU
ivara bhAShegaLigU bhAratada bhAShegaLigU naDuve namage tiLidante
yAva sambandhavU illa. kenaDAdinda hiDidu, dakShiNa amerikAda
dakShiNada koneyavaregU I bhAShegaLu baLakeyallive.janasankhyeya


maTTige I bhAShegaLannADuvavaru dakShiNa amerikAdalli ivattigU
prabalarAgiddAre. eppattu lakSha janara mAtAgiruva kvecuvA bhAShe
kolambiyA, yukaDOr, peru mattu bolIviyAgaLallU,
mUvattu lakSha janara mAtAgiruva guvArAnI bhAShe parAgvE, brEjil
mattu arjenTInAgaLallU, hadinaydu lakSha janara mAtAgiruva
ayyArA bhAShe peru mattu bolIviyAgaLallU, mattu hattu lakSha
janara mAtAgiruva nahuvAts bhAShe dakShiNa meksikOdallU baLake
yallive.

idakke viruddhavAgi, kenaDA mattu uttara amerikAgaLalli I bhAShe
gaLannADuva janara sankhye heccendare kelavu sAviragaLaShTu mAtra kANisu
ttade. dakShiNa amerikAdalli daTTavAda kADugaLidda kAraNa I bhAShegaLa
nnADuvavaru pAScAtya vasAhatudArara gunDige sikkade tappisikonDu
iddudu, mattu uttara amerikAdalli kADu pradESa kaDimeyidda kAraNa
avaralli heccinavarU nASahondiddudE idakke mukhya kAraNa.

amerinD bhAShegaLannu uttara, madhya, chib‌chAn-pEjAn,
AnDiyan, tukAnovan, mattu gE-pAnO-kArib emba Aru
upakuTumbagaLalli vibhajisi hELalu sAdhyavideyendu kelavara
abhiprAyavAdare, innu kelavara matadante, I bhAShegaLannoLagonDa
bhAShAkuTumbagaLa sankhye nUrakkintalU jAsti.

ivugaLalli kelavu bhAShAkuTumbagaLannu heccinavarU oppikoLLu
ttAre. algOnkiyan, sAliS, kaDOvan, siyovan, irOkvo
yiyan, hOkan, penuTiyan, tanovan, yuTO-aj‌Tekan
modalAda kuTumbagaLu intahavu.

I bhAShegaLa mattu bhAShAkuTumbagaLa naDuviruva vayvidhyavannu
sankShiptavAgi baNNisabEkiddarU adu ondu doDDa pustakavE AdItu.
iDI vAkyada arthavannu ondu padadoLage tumbisaballa sAliSAn
bhAShegaLinda hiDidu, caynIs‌na hAge padagaLalli svalpavU Antarika
racaneyE illadiruvantaha bhAShegaLU I kuTumbadalli kANisuttave.

<a id="sub-5-5-4"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-5-4)

## ೫. AsTrEliyAda bhAShegaLu

AsTrEliyAdalli ellarU ingliSh mAtanADuttArendu heccinavarU
bhAvisuttirabahudu; Adare, nijakkU ingliSh mAtanADuva jana


AsTrEliyA khanDakke bandu nelesuva modalu, ingliSh‌ginta tIra
bhinnavAgiruva innUru-munnUru bhAShegaLannADuva jana alli nele
siddaru.

vasAhatugArarAgi banda ingliShara kAla tuLitakke sikki, I mUla
nivAsigaLalli heccinavarU Iga aLiduhOgiddAre. avarondige avaru
ADuttidda nUrAru bhAShegaLU heccina maTTige aLiduhOgive. Iga
allondu illondu embudAgi, guDDagADugaLalli mattu marubhUmi
gaLalli mAtra kelavu bhAShegaLu uLidukonDive. avugaLalli mundina
talemArina varege uLiyaballavugaLu ippattakkintalU kaDime.

AsTrEliyA khanDakke ingliSharu valase bandAga, endare sumAru
innUru varShagaLaShTu hinde, alli bahaLa kaDimeyendarU sumAru
mUru lakSha mUla nivAsigaLiddirabEkendu UhisalAgide. nijakkU
ivara sankhye idakkintalU hecciddiralu sAdhyavide.

avara daynandinada jIvana nisargadondige heNedukonDittu. tamma
parisaravannu svalpavU keDisade, adara ondu angavAgi badukuva krama
sAvirAru varShagaLindalU avaralli paramparAgatavAgi beLedubandittu.
tamma dinanityada avaSyakategaLige bEkAdaShTE AhAra mattu itara vastu
gaLannu avaru tamma parisaradinda AydukoLLuttiddaru. bEkAddakkinta
heccu sottugaLannu kUDihAkuva gOjigE avaru hOguttiralilla.
idarindAgi, avara parisara nASavAgade ellarigU txptiyanna koDu
tittu.

inglenD‌ninda mattu yurOpina itara dESagaLinda valase banda
janaru I mUla nivAsigaLa hAge alpatxptarAgiralilla. tamage eShTu
bhUmiyiddarU sAladu, eShTu sampattiddarU sAladu emba manO
bhAva avaradAgittu. tamma kAlakke mAtravallade tamma makkaLa mattu
avara makkaLa kAlakkU sAkAguvaShTu sampattannu kUDihAkidarU avarige
samAdhAnavilla. avara I uddESakke aDDa banda mUla nivAsigaLannu
ondO gunDininda suTTu hAkidaru, illavE phalavattAda bhUmiyannu
biTTu maraLugADinoLakke ODihOguva hAge mADidaru.

tamma jIvanakke hondikonDidda bhUmiyinda bErAda I
aLiduLida janAnga bahubEga naShTavAguttA hOyitu. ittIcegina
ankesankhyegaLa prakAra, AsTrEliyAdalli mUla bhAShegaLannADuva janara
sankhye kaLeda nUru-nUrayvattu varShagaLalli mUru lakShaviddudu
mUvattu sAvirakkiLidide. avara heccina bhAShegaLU nASada hAdiyallive.


yoln‌gu, vArl‌piri, mattu paScima marubhUmiya kelavu bhAShegaLu
mAtra ivattu SAlegaLalli ingliSh‌nondige paThyagaLAgive. intaha
bhAShegaLa sankhye hattakkintalU kaDime.

AsTrEliyAdalli baLakeyalliruva mUla bhAShegaLalli heccinavU
ondE bhAShAkuTumbakke sEridavugaLirabEkendu vidvAmsaru abhiprAya
paTTiddAre. idakke apavAdavendare, miriyam emba pApuvAn bhAShe,
mattu tAsmEniyAdalli baLakeyallidda, mattu Iga aLidu hOgiruva
bEre eraDu bhAShegaLu.

AsTrEliyAda bhAShegaLannu oTTu ೨೬ upakuTumbagaLalli pratyEkisa
bahudu. ivugaLalli mAmA-nyungAn emba ondE ondu upa
kuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLE AsTrEliyAda heccina bhAgagaLallU baLake
yallive. uLida ೨೫ upakuTumbagaLige sErida bhAShegaLella AsTrEliyA
khanDada uttara tudiyalli sangrahitavAgive.

<a id="sub-5-5-5"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-5-5)

## vyAkaraNada vaySiShTya

AsTrEliyAda I mUla bhAShegaLalli sAmAnyavAgi a, i mattu u
emba mUru svaragaLu mAtra iruttave. ivakkinta bhinnavAda e mattu
o svaragaLAgalI, dIrghasvaragaLAgalI ivugaLallilla. idallade, I
bhAShegaLalli svaradinda suruvAguva padagaLu aparUpa.

vyanjanagaLalli ga, ja, Da, da mattu ba emba aydu sparSagaLu mAtra
vallade, nAligeyannu hallugaLa naDuve irisi uccarisuva Araneya
dondu sparSavU ivugaLalliruttade. idE rIti Aru anunAsikagaLU
iruttave. Adare, ka, ca, Ta, ta, pa modalAda aghOSha sparSa
gaLAgalI, kha, cha, Tha, tha, pha modalAda mahAprANAkSharagaLAgalI,
illavE sa, Sa, ha modalAda UShma vyanjanagaLAgalI I bhAShegaLalli
kANisuvudu aparUpa.

I bhAShegaLa sarvanAmagaLu Ekavacana, dvivacana, mattu bahuvacana
embudAgi mUru vacanagaLannu sUcisaballuvu. udAharaNegAgi,
dvirbal emba bhASheyalli baygu endare 'nAnu', bili endare
'nAvibbaru', mattu jana endare 'nAvu mUvaru' illavE 'jAsti jana'
emba artha baruttade.

idallade, uttama puruSha dvivacana mattu bahuvacanagaLalli madhyama
puruShayukta mattu madhyamapuruSharahita emba vyatyAsavannU I
bhASheya sarvanAmagaLu tOrisuttave. udAharaNegAgi, aylitya


endare 'nInu mattu nAnu' endU, jili endare 'ninnannu biTTu
nAvibbaru' endU artha baruttade. hIgeyE, jantu endare 'nInu
mattu nAvu (mUru illavE heccu mandi)' endU, jinnu endare
'ninnannu biTTu nAvu (mUru illavE heccu mandi)' endU artha
baruttade.

<a id="sub-5-5-6"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-5-6)

## hinde-munde, eDakke-balakke

sthAnasUcaka padagaLa baLakeyallU AsTrEliyAda bhAShegaLalli kelavu
vaySiShTyagaLu kANisuttave. obba vyakti illavE ondu vastu ellide
embudannu tiLisuvudakke nAvu hinde-munde, eDakke-balakke,
mEle-keLage emba viSEShaNagaLannu baLasuttEve. Ata maneya
munde nintiddAne, tengina mara maneya eDakke ide embantaha
vAkyagaLalli ivugaLa prayOgavannu kANabahudu.

AsTrEliyAda kelavu bhAShegaLalli obba vyakti illavE ondu vastu
ellideyembudannu hIge innondu vastuvina illavE mAtanADuvavana
dxShTikOnada mUlaka tiLisuva badalu, pUrva-dakShiNa-paScima-
uttara emba dikkugaLa sahAyadindalEnE tiLisalAguttade.

gUgu-yim‌dhir emba bhAShe intahadu. mEle koTTiruva eraDu
vAkyagaLu tiLisuva sangatiyannu I bhASheyalli dikkugaLa sahAyadinda
mAtravE (maneya pUrvakke, maneya paScimakke, ityAdi)
tiLisalAguttade.

citravondaralli kANisuva ibbaru vyaktigaLalli obbanu innobbana
balabadige nintiddAne ennalU I bhASheyalli sAdhyavAgadu. allU
nijavAda dikkannE tiLisabEku, mattu citravannu svalpa tirugisi hiDidare,
dikku badalAgiruvudannU sariyAgi aritu hELabEku.

I rIti cikka cikka vastugaLa sthAnavannU dikkugaLa sahAyadinda
tiLisuvudu namage tIra vicitra mattu bahaLa kaShTada kelasa endu anisa
bahudu. Adare, AsTrEliyAda I mUlanivAsigaLu marubhUmiyalli
sancarisuttirabEkAgideyAda kAraNa, avarige I rIti yAvAgalU
dikkugaLa ariviruvudu tumbA upayuktavAguttade. marubhUmiyalli
sthAna sUcakagaLAgi baLasalu mara, guDDa modalAda gurutugaLAvuvU
iruvudilla; hAgAgi, dikkina jYAnavondarindalE avaru yAvAgalU
tAvelli iruvevembudannu tiLidukonDirabEkAguttade.


<a id="sub-5-5-7"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-5-7)

## attebhAShe

AsTrEliyAda kelavu bhAShegaLalli atte, mAva, attige, bhAva modalAda
sambandhigaLondige mAtanADuvAga baLasuva bhAShe itara sandarbha
gaLalli baLasuva bhASheginta tIrA bhinnavAgiruttade. eraDarallU vyAkaraNa
ondE; Adare, padagaLu mAtra bEre bEre. itararondige mAtanADu
vAga baLasuva padagaLalli ondannU I attebhASheyalli baLasalu sAdhya
villa.

udAharaNegAgi, dyarbala emba bhASheyalli sAmAnyavAgi 'horage
bA' ennalu mayin ennuttAre, Adare adara attebhASheyalli yil
vun ennuttAre; 'tinnu' ennuvudakke sAmAnya bhASheyalli dyang‌iು
ennuttAre, Adare attebhASheyalli yal‌miiು ennuttAre.

I viSiShTavAda attebhASheyannu ganDasaru tamma atte (henDatiya
tAyi), sose (magana henDati), attige (tAyiya sahOdarana illavE
tandeya sahOdariya magaLu) - ivarondigU, hengasaru tamma
mAva (ganDana tande), aLiya (magaLa ganDa), mattu bhAva (tAyiya
sahOdarana illavE tandeya sahOdariya maga) - ivarondigU
kaDDAyavAgi baLasabEkAguttade.

bEre kelavu sambandhigaLondigU (udA: ganDasara maTTige
tAyiya sahOdarana maga, mattu hengasara maTTige tAyiya sahO
darana magaLu) attebhASheyannu baLasabahudAdarU, idaralli kaDDAya
villa. uLidavarondige mAtra, I attebhASheyannu baLasabAradu;
sAmAnya bhASheyannE baLasabEku.

I attebhASheya ondu vaySiShTyavEnendare, adaralli baLakeyAguva
padagaLu bahaLa kaDime, endare sAmAnya bhASheyalli iruvudara kAlu
bhAgadaShTu padagaLu mAtra idaralli baLakeyAguttave. hIgiddarU, hELa
bEkendiruva sangatigaLannella adara mUlaka hELalu EnU tondare
yAguvudilla. I rIti padagaLa sankhye attebhASheyalli kaDimeyiralu
mukhya kAraNavEnendare, sAmAnya bhASheyalli baruva mUru-nAlku
padagaLige badalAgi, attebhASheyalli ondE padaviruttade.

udAharaNegAgi, attebhASheyalli 'nODu' embarthada immal
emba ondu padakke badalAgi, sAmAnya bhASheyalli vabal 'mEle
nODu', biDidsay 'eveyikkade nODu', gindal 'rAtri hottu
dIpada beLakinalli nODu', mamil 'gottAgada hAge nODu',
buDal 'obbana kaDege nODu' modalAda padagaLive.


I eraDu rItiya bhAShegaLu dyarbal‌nalli haLabaralli mAtra uLi
diveyallade, taruNa-taruNiyara mattu huDuga-huDugiyara mAtinalli
uLidilla. I mUlanivAsigaLa itara sampradAyagaLa hAge, I bhAShA
sampradAyavU naSisi hOguttide.

AsTrEliyAda mUlanivAsigaLa bhASheyalli kANisuva innondu
vaySiShTyavEnendare, avara samAjadalli yArAdarU sattare Atana
hesarannu hOluva pada avara bhASheyalli yAvudiddarU adannu
anantara uccarisuvantilla; hAge uccarisidalli Atana Atma avariru
vallige bandItemba nambikeyE idakke kAraNa. I sampradAyadindAgi,
avara bhASheya halavu padagaLu ondondAgi baLakeyinda hora
bILuttiruttave, mattu avugaLa jAgavannu bEre padagaLu Akramisu
tiruttave. Adare, ondu samAjadalli I rIti kANeyAda padagaLannu
pakkada samAjadalli kANabahudu.

<a id="sec-5-7"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sec-5-7)

## ೫.೭ OSiyAnAda bhAShegaLu

pesiphik mattu hindU mahAsAgaragaLalli haraDiruva sAvirAru dvIpa
gaLalli vAsisuva janaralli sAvirAru bhinna bhinnavAda bhAShegaLu baLake
yallive. I dvIpagaLalli kANisuva bhAShegaLa sankhye jagattina oTTu
bhAShegaLa SEkaDA naluvattaraShTAgabahudendu kelavaru lekka hAkiddAre.
ivannu mukhyavAgi AsTOnESiyan mattu inDO-pesiphik emba
eraDu bhAShAkuTumbagaLalli vingaDisabahudu.

ivugaLalli AsTrEnESiyan bhAShegaLu bahaLa vistAravAgi I
eraDu mahAsAgaragaLalliruva ellA dvIpagaLallU endare, AphrikA
khanDada hattiraviruva meDagAskar dvIpadinda hiDidu inDOnESiyA,
philipayns dvIpagaLannu dATi, munde pesiphik mahAsAgaradalliruva
havAyi dvIpagaLavaregU habbikonDiruvuvAdare, inDO-pesiphik
bhAShegaLu nyUgini mattu adara suttumuttalina dvIpagaLalli mAtra
baLakeyallive.

Adare, AsTrEnESiyan bhAShegaLella ondakkondu tIra hattirada
sambandhavannu tOrisuttive, mattu idakke viruddhavAgi, inDO-
pesiphik bhAShegaLu ondE kaDe sEriddarU halavAru rItiya vayvidhya
gaLannu tOrisuttiddu, avannella ondE kuTumbadalli sErisi hELalu
sAdhyavE emba viShayadalli vidvAmsaroLage matabhEdavide.


<a id="sub-5-7-1"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-7-1)

## AsTOnESiyan bhAShegaLu

maDagAskar‌na malagAsi, malayESiyAda malay, inDOnESiyAda
bahasA inDOnESiyA, jAvanIs, sunDanIs, mAdurIs, bAli,
philipayns‌na pilipinO (tagalOg), pOlinESyAda samOvan,
tahitiyan mattu havAyiyan modalAda oTTu ondu sAvira
bhAShegaLu AsTOnESiyan kuTumbakke sEruttave. I bhAShegaLannu
mukhyavAgi malayO-pOlinESiyan emba ondu doDDa upa
kuTumbadallU, atAyalik, tsavyik mattu payvanik emba mUru
cikka upakuTumbagaLallU sErisi hELabahudendu vidvAmsaru
abhiprAyapaTTiddAre.

I kuTumbakke sErida sumAru innUrarinda munnUraraShTu bhAShe
gaLu nyUginiyinda paScimakke baLakeyalliddu, ivannADuvavara sankhye
೨೦೦ miliyadaShTide. nyUginiyinda pUrvakke idakkintalU jAsti,
endare sumAru munnUrarinda nAnnUrara varege bhAShegaLiveyAdarU,
ivannADuvavara sankhye mAtra eraDu miliyadaShTu mAtra ide. ೬೫
miliya janara jAvanIs, ೨೦ miliya janara sunDanIs, mattu ೧೦
miliya janara tagalOg (philipayns‌na bhAShe) embavu I bhAShegaLalli
janasankhyeya maTTige mukhyavAdavugaLu.

sAmAnyavAgi I bhAShegaLalli baLakeyAguva varNagaLa sankhye bahaLa
cikkadu. udAharaNegAgi, mavori bhASheyalli oTTu hattu vyanjanagaLu
(k, t, p, ph, h, m, n, j, r, v) mAtra baLakeyallive.
Adare, svaragaLu hattu (hrasva mattu dIrgha svaragaLu sEri) ive.

malayO-pOlinESiyan kuTumbada ondu vibhAgavAda
OSiyAnik illavE melanESiyan bhAShegaLa ondu vaySiShTya
vEnendare, ivugaLalli nirdESaka sarvanAmagaLu 'mAtanADuvavana
hattira', 'kELugana hattira', mattu 'ibbarindalU dUra' embudAgi
mUru viSiShTavAda sthAnagaLannu sUcisuttave. bhAratadalli baLake
yalliruva kelavu TibeTO-barman bhAShegaLallU, yurOpina
yurAlik bhAShegaLallU intaha mUru rItiya sthAnanirdESaka
sarvanAmagaLannu kANabahudu.


bhAShegaLa bagge nIvEnu balliri?

<a id="sub-5-7-2"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sub-5-7-2)

## inDO-pesiphik bhAShegaLu

I kuTumbakke sErida bhAShegaLa sankhye sAvirakke hattira ideyAdarU,
ivannADuva janara sankhye oTTu ippattu lakShakkinta jAstiyilla. mukhya
vAgi nyUgini emba ondE ondu dvIpadalli haraDiveyAdarU, I
bhAShegaLu ondakkinta ondu tIra bhinnavAgiddu avannella ondE kuTumba
dalli sErisi hELabahudemba vAdavannu ellarU oppuvudilla.

bhAratada anDamAn dvIpadalli baLakeyalliruva kelavu bhAShe
gaLannU I kuTumbadalli sErisabahudendu kelavaru abhiprAyapaTTi
ddAre. ivallade, Iga pUrti aLidu hOgiruva tasmIniyAda bhAShe
gaLu, nyUginiya madhyabhAgadalli baLakeyalliruva bhAShegaLu, paScimada
pApuvAn bhAShegaLu, pUrvada bhAShegaLu, vAyavyada bhAShegaLu mattu
pesiphik bhAShegaLu embudAgi I bhAShegaLannu ELu vibhAgagaLAgi
hancalu sAdhyavideyendu kelavaru abhiprAyapaTTiddAre.

nyUgini dvIpadalli baLakeyalliruva oTTu ondu sAvira bhAShegaLalli
mukkAlu pAlaShTu, endare sumAru ೭೫೦ bhAShegaLu pApuvAn emba
ondu vibhAgakke sEruttave. I bhAShegaLa ondu vaySiShTyavEnendare,
ivugaLalli svatantra mattu asvatantragaLemba eraDu rItiya kriyApada
gaLiruttave. AkhyAta mattu kAla pratyayagaLalli heccinavU svatantra
kriyApadagaLondige mAtra baruttave.

<a id="sec-5-8"></a>

[ಕನ್ನಡ →](./27-bhASheya-bagge-kn#sec-5-8)

## ೫.೮ muktAya

jagattinalliruva janarella ondE bhASheyannADuva hAgiddare bahaLa
oLLeyadu endu bhAvisuva mandi nammalli kelavariddAre. hIgAdalli,
bEre bEre bhAShegaLannu kaliyuva kelasa tappabahudu mAtravalla,
bhASheya hesarinalli ivattu naDeyuttiruva nUrAru hOrATagaLU
illavAgabahudendu I janaru bhAvisuttAre.

Adare, nijakkU namage intaha EkarUpate bEkE embudannu
pariSIlisuva avaSyakateyide. ellarU ondE rItiya baTTegaLannu
uDuva hAgAdalli, ondE rItiya sAmAnugaLannu baLasuva
hAgAdalli, mattu ondE rItiya giDagaLannu neDuva hAgAdalli halavu
bageya samasyegaLannu mattu tondaregaLannu kaDime mADabahudEnO


nija; Adare, idarindAgi namma jIvanadalli Iga kANisuva
vayvidhyateyE illavAgi, ellavU nIrasavAgaballudu.

idallade, kAla badalAdantella prapancadalli kANisuva jIvigaLalli
kelavu hosa kAlakke hondikoLLalu asamarthavAgi nASagoLLuvudannu
nAvu kANuttEve. yAva rItiya jIvi I rIti aLiduhOgaballudu,
mattu yAvudu uLiyaballudu embudannu nAvu avugaLa ivattina
naDateya illavE sAmarthyada AdhArada mEle nirdharisalArevu.
hAgAgi, jIvigaLalli kANisuva vayvidhyateyannu aLisi hAkidalli, munde
baraliruva ondu kAladalli uLiyabahudAda jIviyE illavendAgalu
sAdhyavide.

bhASheyalli kANisuva vayvidhyateyU idE rItiyadu. namma
jIvanadalli kANisuva itara vayvidhyategaLanteyE adU atyavaSya
vAdudu. ivattina avaSyakategaLannu pUraysalu ingliSh illavE hindi
bhAShe atyanta samarthavendu kelavaru bhAvisabahudu. Adare munde
baruva ondu divasadalli avugaLa badalu Iga tIrA keLamaTTadalliruva
guDDagADina janara ondu bhAShe heccu samarthavendu siddhavAgalu
sAdhyavide. hAgAgi, bhASheya uLivE adaralli kANisuva vayvidhyateya
mEle avalambisideyendu hELabahudu.

bhAShegaLalli kANisuva I vayvidhyateyannu aritaShTU bhASheya
svarUpa namage heccu heccu spaShTavAguttA hOguttade. Adare, I
viShayadalli nAvu tiLiyabEkAdaddu innU bahaLa jAsti ide. nUrAru
varShagaLindalU sAvirAru mandi samSOdhakaru ingliSh bhASheya
mEle samSOdhanegaLannu naDesuttA bandiddAre; hAgiddarU, A bhASheya
kuritAgi ivattigU hosa hosa viShayagaLu horabaruttive. hIgiru
vAga, obbarO ibbarO samSOdhane naDesuttiruva itara bhAShegaLa
pADEnu?

idallade, samSOdhakaru sAmAnyavAgi jAsti samSOdhane mADida
bhASheya svarUpavannE itara bhAShegaLallU kANuttAre. samskxtada
vyAkaraNa niyamagaLannu kannaDadalli kanDa kannaDa vayyAkaraNigaLa avasthe
intahadu. tAvu abhyAsa mADuva bhASheya nijavAda svarUpavEnu
embudannu tiLiyalu ivaru innaShTu ALavAda samSOdhanegaLannu mADa
bEkAguttade. prapancadalliruva sAviragaTTale bhAShegaLalli eShTannu I
rIti abhyAsa mADalu sAdhya?


bhAShegaLa kuritu namagiruva ajYAna entahadu embudannu idu
spaShTavAgi tOrisikoDuttade. I ajYAnavannu nivArisalu nAvu
prayatnisabEku mAtravalla, AdaShTu maTTige bhAShegaLa naDuviruva
vayvidhyateyannu uLisikoLLuvudakkU nAvu prayatnisabEku. kannaDada
upabhAShegaLa naDuvina vyatyAsagaLu kannaDada SrImantikeyannu
pratibimbisuttave. A upabhAShegaLalli ondu sari uLiduvella tappu
emba bhAvaneyannu nAvu toDedu hAkabEku. nijakkU kannaDada uLivu
I vayvidhyateyannavalambiside embudannu nAvu mareyabAradu.
